name: Beto for Texas
subject: NEW: Abbott just announced
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
This is a make-or-break moment for us.
#
Greg Abbott just made it official. Today, he announced his run for a third term as governor.
Today’s announcement might seem like a formality, but that’s not the case. **Today marks Abbott and his mega-donors putting EVERYTHING into the fight to beat Beto.** In the coming weeks, he’s launching a statewide ad blitz and dozens of events across the state — with $55 million and counting at his back.
**[This is a make-or-break moment for us. Will you help Beto take on Abbott and win by donating $3 right now?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51590?refcode=ema20220108-170634&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=170634%2E444211%2E-90yfQ)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51590?refcode=ema20220108-170634&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=170634%2E444211%2E-90yfQ)**
No matter how Abbott tries to spin it, we know this: none of us can afford four more years under Abbott’s fringe policies on masks, abortion, guns, and Covid — or his incompetent, corrupt management of our power grid.
76,000 Texans have lost their lives to Covid-19 on his watch, while hundreds of families are still waiting for Abbott to answer for the loved ones they lost during last year’s winter storm. **A leader who doesn’t value our lives is no leader at all — much less one who is worthy of serving Texas as Governor.**
Beto is our chance at a brand-new vision for Texas: one where every person has access to good jobs, quality health care, a world-class education, and safe communities, no matter what. But we can’t beat Abbott if we don’t fight back in key moments — like right now, when he’s massively gearing up his campaign statewide.
**[Please, chip in today to fire Greg Abbott and elect Beto to be a governor for ALL Texans. Anything you can give today will make a big difference.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51590?refcode=ema20220108-170634&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=170634%2E444211%2E-90yfQ)**
We’re so proud to be building this movement with you.
Thank you,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220108-170634-footer&t=22&refcode2=170634_444211_-90yfQ&akid=170634%2E444211%2E-90yfQ)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=170634%2E444211%2E-90yfQ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=170634%2E444211%2E-90yfQ)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

To celebrate our Bulldogs playing again in the title game, Team Herschel is doing something very special...

**... we're giving away a UGA #34 jersey signed by Heisman Trophy winner Herschel Walker and personalized for the winner!**

If you would like to unsubscribe visit this Peter, The greatest threat to our freedoms is summed up in two words... BIG TECH. If that wasn’t the case, then why was Marjorie Taylor Greene permanently banned from Twitter, but the Taliban and the CCP are still on the site?! Why did YouTube delete Joe Rogan’s interview with mRNA vaccine creator Dr. Robert Malone?! Why was a conservative media company suspended on Twitter for quoting a congressman?! These Big Tech overlords say they care about the “public discussion” and allow for “discourse,” but really, they shut down, suspend, and stifle anyone that disagrees with their Leftist agenda. We see it every time someone points out COVID hypocrisy or questions Dr. Fauci. Or whenever a conservative defends President Trump. They say they’re doing this to “protect our democracy,” but we all know what they’re really doing – censoring conservatives. Here’s a radical idea for our Big Tech overlords:everyoneshould be allowed to say what they think and feel. We can debate what’s true and what’s not, like how our Founding Fathers envisioned! Some of us call this FREE SPEECH. People like the Squad shouldn’t get to say whatever the hell they want while other members of Congress are silenced. Ilhan Omar makes repeated anti-Semitic remarks... and Big Tech turns a blind eye. Rashida Tlaib takes aim at Israel and the Jewish people... Big Tech turns a blind eye. Big Tech continues to stifle conservatives, Peter, and we HAVE to fight back! That’s why I’m running as an unapologetic MAGA conservative in Illinois’ 11th Congressional district against Pelosi puppet Bill Foster. Instead of fighting for the voice of all his constituents, Bill Foster sits back and watches while Facebook, Twitter, and Google silence his opponents. We need real leadership that will stand up to the Big Tech overlords and fight for the American people! My name is Catalina Lauf. I’m a former Trump administration official that is on a mission to fight for the America First agenda! And first on the list is breaking up Big Tech monopolies that stifle conservative voices and thoughts like ours! name: Christie
subject: I selected you to represent Pennsylvania:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| [](https://go.dscc.org/go/4520?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20220108-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220108-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&akid=2518%2E9716520%2ECGJsBY)
---
Hi Friend -- I'm Christie Roberts and I'm the Executive Director of the DSCC. **That means it's my job to develop the Democratic Party's strategy to protect and expand our Senate majority.**

As you know, our majority is perilously thin and we can't afford to make _any_ mistakes. So I am inviting a few trusted Democrats from each state to join my personal Focus Group to help _perfect_ our strategy **\-- and I chose you specifically!**

[**I'm standing by to review your responses, so please click here to enter my focus group immediately >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/4520?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20220108-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220108-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&akid=2518%2E9716520%2ECGJsBY)

_*Note: I need to review your responses by tomorrow morning, so please don't wait!_

I helped guide Raphael Warnock's campaign, and I cannot overstate how crucial this community's support and input were to our victories in Georgia. That's why I chose you for this exclusive opportunity -- I'm _100%_ confident your insights will drastically improve our strategy.

[**So please, will you accept this invitation to join my personal focus group before tonight's deadline?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/4520?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20220108-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220108-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&akid=2518%2E9716520%2ECGJsBY)

| **DPWILLIS67@GMAIL.COM**
**Focus Group Status: OPEN**
---

Thanks for all you do! I am eagerly awaiting your responses.

Christie Roberts
Executive Director, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2022-q1?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=2518_9716520_CGJsBY&akid=2518%2E9716520%2ECGJsBY)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=2518%2E9716520%2ECGJsBY)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=2518%2E9716520%2ECGJsBY)** to unsubscribe.

Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc.org](https://www.dscc.org/)** | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren.
_Sponsored message_
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zhtvrkhkjgkojou90mn1fadev4oo82084jp4dhf8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth66o31c1h2bs) [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z6vcgpp3j3m9c41kt5o86o2ji1l06vju0lcig4do_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth66o31c1h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zkbpq6r090lc0e2tt748l7ri7ogte5mqsgudhim0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth66o31c1h2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zukfpo4n8ot7qflu4merdgd88bopvjr8ispigu78_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth66o31c1h2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: What’s ahead for 2022
body:
This year will be the biggest year yet for Republicans in the Senate
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpind3ae3nfonrf34m24avsg1jlac5nagv91f5i0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrm4s5lehim8cj0s2o79or1e1h79dbi63hr4opimgor2slmcqr76d3kcqp7aclnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lib6p9nmar6cc5gmdhmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5i6eoj3chh66oh5u)
Fellow conservative,
**This year will be the _biggest year yet_ for Republicans in the Senate:**

-We’re fighting to stop Joe Biden’s socialist spending agenda.
-We’re defending your freedom of speech and taking on big tech.
-We’re working to keep our elections secure and preserve our Democracy.

**But most importantly, we’re doing everything we can to TAKE BACK PRESIDENT TRUMP’S MAJORITY. **

The Senate is our _last line of defense_ against radical socialist policies, and if we fail to take back our majority, the far Left will have a blank check to turn America into a failed socialist state.

Loyal patriots across the country are doing everything they can to take back the Senate and defend your freedom, but no matter how many hours we put in, _we can’t win this fight without you._

**[Pitch in $25 so we can take back President Trump’s majority and defend America from socialism. >>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze8he2ucd1h9orldukqjtrk3gv061enm26a9sed8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth66p32cdh2bs)** [**PITCH IN $25**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn0ps0atutjcv6toiia1raimdrqlqherdscgqj9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth66p32cdh2bs) [**PITCH IN OTHER AMOUNT**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zas7m2idoacekrjel378em3qmhncs5irunjpc0b8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth66p32cdh2bs) Your support is critical to showing Americans the TRUTH about the Democrat party and saving our country from our enemies who want to destroy it.

**[Pitch in just $25 today and help us take back the Senate so we can get our country back on track. >>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5p7o895eh4fo4hmrjvejpo8onk8hilun0lng72g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth66p32cdh2bs)** [**PITCH IN $25**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcp8vc6f3998snklibd7gmdfud5jqqjh7vkpvsn8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth66p32cdh2bs) [**PITCH IN OTHER AMOUNT**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfcskaimas4c7ppcv3895rpr2u4vpmadhr6g0gf0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth66p32cdh2bs) Thank you,

Senate Conservatives [**TAKE A STAND**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgfqclkepibn5hrr9rb9qsc3ouq4gsua70rb09h0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth66p32cdh2bs) Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Taking back the U.S. Senate is no small task. 5 Republicans are retiring, and we must win all those races and one more. We need patriots from across the country to join the fight and do their part to help win back the Senate majority. This is a team effort! Thank you for your ongoing support of me and Senate Republicans.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6e13eguuht2foptdi2v1m2buecdiaul3iqdpd7g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth66p33c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6s3m61qn5c5icho63cjmcor33cdjc1ir2obkecq32tdimgrr4stge4p65dr1e3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8omccbgmdhm0tj6cor61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjegpmn0fm86l8n7gvdh2humr650sb37ucskg0f8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth66p33c3h2bs) [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zft8vuqjh0ocev13elquj5mtqr8dmqfpi6la8p90_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth66p33c3h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeigmu4on9gi9jl0o28ia64af037ogev54cnlse0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth66p33c3h2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1kpdt9esbqbo4u065gu2gtvpscv71d9cd6647ro_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth66p33c3h2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---

---

name: American Update
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8301%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=R9krrTFw4Yd9TJU%2fplNPoQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11297%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XwOkhqnxPrurhXoZeIdngA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well.
Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time.
How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges?
Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_.
Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.
Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.”
That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves.
**So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
_**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more.
The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11298%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mNTvszKPU4vrx7Sv5vniWA&sysid=1) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long.
Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11299%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RVMUP%2fGJvuufdHDwgw%2fGCw&sysid=1)
Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8301%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=R9krrTFw4Yd9TJU%2fplNPoQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8301%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=R9krrTFw4Yd9TJU%2fplNPoQ&sysid=1)

# Weekly Newsletter
---
|
---
January 09 | Issue II
---
| |
---
| |
---
### Statement From Senator Rob Ortt
### On Hochul Administration Prioritizing Non-White People In Distributing COVID-19 Treatments
---
We are not even a full week into the new year and Democrat leaders are already despicably playing identity politics with the pandemic. It is unacceptable that an official New York State COVID memorandum contains language suggesting that the color of one's skin will be a factor in whether he or she has access to COVID treatment. There should only be one basis for treatment; and that is medical need.
We saw the downfall of Andrew Cuomo because his power went unchallenged for so many years. The Legislature must fulfill its constitutional duty to provide a check on the Governor's office and block ridiculous policies like these that pit New Yorkers against one another. This is wrong, our state deserves better, and if the Hochul Administration is serious about leadership, they would be well advised to immediately withdraw this policy.
###
---
| [Read Article](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kR6DmmV1RnFMryl0hCCPZtz8Spt80JOrAJdKyr1WYRkNcUGOl61RImhykLfcjUVLrg4Vpazj1rHgjYhni66HS0F7DjVxQ-_AOMpB4IGKQQh1I9uDSlcJiTX9GkLzfR-6sn6luzd9jyhnEu0UDi_dFhMohtlyxf7P2dVkl80pzJDjyNdG8l261fQwIb0qp_U09mLz_HguYlZ0avCi75x_QajNZMzBL2NNU20eCNzepfQIrK5XcujT3krd9dqNjoMx&c=FSN0fMEAdhWQnFJFl28bDzr1jpmWATWXi_0MuP9ieW4fEzbEOph8WQ==&ch=c2mb8mvyQV__6jm6J6MSBY-zlx_y9Gjk2TTlGp4Z44ElK1HWX-raow==)

### Rob Ortt responds to State Senators receiving weekly at-home COVID-19 tests.
---
When my constituents go looking for COVID tests to protect themselves and their families, they find empty store shelves and long lines. We need to expand testing access for all New Yorkers to save lives and help us get back to business.
I don't believe New York's political class should receive special access to testing. I will not accept at-home test kits at a time when my constituents cannot get them, and will be donating any tests I receive to my local health departments. I am calling on Governor Hochul to redirect the $65 million fund she created to police small businesses, and use those funds to expand access to testing across New York. These taxpayer dollars should be invested directly in public health resources, not used to punish already struggling small businesses.
---
|
---
Senate Republicans Unveil
### 'Take Back New York' 2022 Legislative Agenda
---
Comprehensive strategy would make New York State safer, stronger and more economically vibrant after years of Democrat-driven decline.
On Wednesday, the New York State Senate Republican Conference officially released its "Take Back New York" 2022 legislative agenda. A response to the neglect and decline of our state created by Democrat One-Party Rule, Take Back New York would restore balance and common sense to government while vigorously rejecting the extreme policies of the past three years.
If enacted, Take Back New York 2022 would:

* Offer a better quality of life for all New Yorkers

* Make New York more affordable for every resident

* Develop a strong workforce for a strong economy

* Improve our business climate and expand economic opportunity

* Ensure security for our vulnerable populations

* Restore accountability to the state government

### Senator Dan Stec, SD-45
---

clean_body: Sunday, January 9th Edition | | | | == | Weekly Newsletter | January 09 | Issue II | | | | Statement From Senator Rob Ortt On Hochul Administration Prioritizing Non-White People In Distributing COVID-19 Treatments We are not even a full week into the new year and Democrat leaders are already despicably playing identity politics with the pandemic. It is unacceptable that an official New York State COVID memorandum contains language suggesting that the color of one's skin will be a factor in whether he or she has access to COVID treatment. There should only be one basis for treatment; and that is medical need. We saw the downfall of Andrew Cuomo because his power went unchallenged for so many years. The Legislature must fulfill its constitutional duty to provide a check on the Governor's office and block ridiculous policies like these that pit New Yorkers against one another. This is wrong, our state deserves better, and if the Hochul Administration is serious about leadership, they would be well advised to immediately withdraw this policy. | == | | Rob Ortt responds to State Senators receiving weekly at-home COVID-19 tests. When my constituents go looking for COVID tests to protect themselves and their families, they find empty store shelves and long lines. We need to expand testing access for all New Yorkers to save lives and help us get back to business. I don't believe New York's political class should receive special access to testing. I will not accept at-home test kits at a time when my constituents cannot get them, and will be donating any tests I receive to my local health departments. I am calling on Governor Hochul to redirect the $65 million fund she created to police small businesses, and use those funds to expand access to testing across New York. These taxpayer dollars should be invested directly in public health resources, not used to punish already struggling small businesses. | Senate Republicans Unveil 'Take Back New York' 2022 Legislative Agenda Comprehensive strategy would make New York State safer, stronger and more economically vibrant after years of Democrat-driven decline. On Wednesday, the New York State Senate Republican Conference officially released its "Take Back New York" 2022 legislative agenda. A response to the neglect and decline of our state created by Democrat One-Party Rule, Take Back New York would restore balance and common sense to government while vigorously rejecting the extreme policies of the past three years. If enacted, Take Back New York 2022 would: Offer a better quality of life for all New Yorkers Make New York more affordable for every resident Develop a strong workforce for a strong economy Improve our business climate and expand economic opportunity Ensure security for our vulnerable populations Restore accountability to the state government | == | | | News Timeline | | Senator Ortt joined multiple news stations this week to discuss the State of the State, the New York State Senate Republican "Take Back New York" 2022 legislative agenda, & MORE. Click the links below to listen or watch. Ortt previews Governor Kathy Hochul's State of the State on WGY Mornings with Doug Goudie. Ortt joins New York Now with Dan Clark to discusses his reaction to the State of the State address. Ortt discusses the New York State Senate Republicans "Take Back New York" 2022 legislative agenda on the Joe Piscopo Show. == Senator Ortt joins WSYR Syracuse Morning News with Dave Allen to discusses the "Take Back New York" 2022 legislative agenda. == Senator Ortt joins Capital Tonight with Susan Arbetter to discuss the State of the State, bail reform, and the "Take Back New" York 2022 legislative agenda. == Senator Ortt joins WTEN Empire State Weekly with Ryan Peterson to discuss the State of the State and the "Take Back New" York 2022 legislative agenda. | | | Senator Spotlight | | | | == | Senator Dan Stec, SD-45 Senator Dan Stec recently introduced vital legislation that would allow for better coverage of Emergency Medical Services (EMS) in the Adirondacks. | == | | | | Follow Rob Ortt on Social Media: == == == | | | PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR SENATE | | | | | | | Ortt for State Senate | PO Box 1279, North Tonawanda, NY 14120 | | Sent by mailto:rob@robortt.com in collaboration with |

body:
Friend, in just the last few years, we’ve seen liberal government wreak havoc on our way of life. From nationwide rioting
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zitl57cl155scvjt69ftf9ikdf6cn8r6ujn5r65o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth69or4c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sri66q62dr76srb7cbme6p68o71c8qm6d3l6hq6at5me4oe8o33m3j72dpm6jgefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5jckrr5cb6e4qb6oj7m2qmash5u)

---
Friend, in just the last few years, we’ve seen liberal government wreak havoc on our way of life.

From nationwide rioting and violent protests to unconstitutional lockdowns, to mask mandates and record-setting inflation, Americans are facing difficult times.

And an out-of-control, Democrat-led Congress and liberal president in the White House isn’t helping. Instead of providing solutions, they continue to pour billions of taxpayer dollars into pet projects and bad investments.

That’s why today, I’m officially announcing my campaign for reelection to serve the people of Kentucky - and the whole liberty movement - in the Senate for another term.

**[STAND WITH RAND: CHIP IN TO SUPPORT RE-ELECTION >>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm3kuqfe2vie2tpiaon76dc2cm6klcpc7ah1asq8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth69or4c5h2bs)**

I know this race won’t be easy -- we have tough challenges ahead.
** **
The bureaucrats in our government, the pro-censorship leaders in big-tech, and the anti-freedom liberals in the media will do anything they can to make sure we don’t succeed.
** **
That’s why I want to start off with a big goal - to make sure we’re prepared for whatever comes next. I’m pledging today to raise $100,000 for the launch of this campaign and I hope you’ll join me by chipping in now.
__
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $15**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zijfulei1j1hdrg5q22rbu6djk7upsjtv1k63n8g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth69or4c5h2bs)
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $25**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqeollnq6dp0ssnolhn4vjorp6h7u9q1he5burmg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth69or4c5h2bs)
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $35**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4n6c5lr8ie52ika45cjk25fnvg96s68d90nectg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth69or4c5h2bs)
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $45**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zegb8n9505j6d1bsr7t2h6ln3kqv13dmlr05ob2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth69or4c5h2bs)
The stakes are just too high to let the liberals maintain control in Washington.

You’re already feeling the damage they’ve done!

* Gas prices are up 40%
* Groceries cost up to 6% more
* Rent, cars, and energy prices are skyrocketing
* _Americans are struggling. _

It’s hitting us hard all over the nation.

And here in Kentucky, where we’re recovering not only from a pandemic but a statewide natural disaster, we simply cannot afford to continue down this path.

We must correct the course now. And we can do that by taking back the Senate and restoring a common-sense, pro-freedom approach to government.

**_Let’s not forget: we only need one seat to take control. _**

And I’m 100% confident that if we stand together now we can take a stand for liberty and win that one seat to take back the Senate in 2022.

Please, chip in what you can to make our launch a success and start this year off the right way: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3476970/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1etgj1b5ug9pl5upt7hdj5v3c9ebpjio5e4e40o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cth69or4c5h2bs)**

Thank you in advance.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Rand Paul
subject: re: course correction starting now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
Friend, in just the last few years, we’ve seen liberal government wreak havoc on our way of life. From nationwide rioting
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaoso98qhjabpf34s1jdrems3od0n7tjnujkar68_rp22sh2s8i66ob4ctj68ob6chh2bs) | |
---
Friend, in just the last few years, we’ve seen liberal government wreak havoc on our way of life.

From nationwide rioting and violent protests to unconstitutional lockdowns, to mask mandates and record-setting inflation, Americans are facing difficult times.

And an out-of-control, Democrat-led Congress and liberal president in the White House isn’t helping. Instead of providing solutions, they continue to pour billions of taxpayer dollars into pet projects and bad investments.

That’s why today, I’m officially announcing my campaign for reelection to serve the people of Kentucky - and the whole liberty movement - in the Senate for another term.

**[STAND WITH RAND: CHIP IN TO SUPPORT RE-ELECTION >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfdqrlhvemdh00khg86jr18muraqkkkfvgn77bd0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4ctj68ob6chh2bs)**

I know this race won’t be easy -- we have tough challenges ahead.
** **
The bureaucrats in our government, the pro-censorship leaders in big-tech, and the anti-freedom liberals in the media will do anything they can to make sure we don’t succeed.
** **
That’s why I want to start off with a big goal - to make sure we’re prepared for whatever comes next. I’m pledging today to raise $100,000 for the launch of this campaign and I hope you’ll join me by chipping in now.
__
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $15**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhiu76i1gbjm81dm1ime2bacluk8qlld4e2rem6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4ctj68ob6chh2bs)
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $25**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsd6qosnf56bh87blvqhhlq4u5vmrkjpd72qd0bg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4ctj68ob6chh2bs)
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $35**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmkag5206v225cg875glo729gasltckq2eu9c0g8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4ctj68ob6chh2bs)
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $45**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0nogqcrd2r3svbugh4c31f5vlr274ardhdcbc1g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4ctj68ob6chh2bs)
The stakes are just too high to let the liberals maintain control in Washington.

You’re already feeling the damage they’ve done!

* Gas prices are up 40%
* Groceries cost up to 6% more
* Rent, cars, and energy prices are skyrocketing
* _Americans are struggling. _

It’s hitting us hard all over the nation.

And here in Kentucky, where we’re recovering not only from a pandemic but a statewide natural disaster, we simply cannot afford to continue down this path.

We must correct the course now. And we can do that by taking back the Senate and restoring a common-sense, pro-freedom approach to government.

**_Let’s not forget: we only need one seat to take control. _**

And I’m 100% confident that if we stand together now we can take a stand for liberty and win that one seat to take back the Senate in 2022.

Please, chip in what you can to make our launch a success and start this year off the right way: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3476970/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zevqdv973q38502ss2mtni7phg7t8c36otrktit0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4ctj68ob6chh2bs)**

Thank you in advance.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

| | Hey folks, I hope I’m catching some of you as you’re sitting down for your morning coffee. I wish I could sit down with each of you over a cup of joe and discuss which issues matter most to you and your families, but writing this email to you as mine is brewing is the next best thing. I’m up early because I love mornings in Robeson County. The sun peaking over the trees, the cool breeze – and it’s also the perfect time for me to reflect on the year ahead and think about campaign strategy. But first, I want to check in with you about your priorities for my campaign in 2022 – [**will you take two minutes to fill out my 2022 issue survey?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40498617/324631424/-1092343984?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGM2OTkwZi00YzcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j0btkgaasy9C8dwEZ13T8SMguJccNCcGPtrVeKf_OxQ=&emci=8c88d8d9-4263-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=1dc6990f-4c71-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=18922910) | | | [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40498618/324631426/-1092343984?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGM2OTkwZi00YzcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j0btkgaasy9C8dwEZ13T8SMguJccNCcGPtrVeKf_OxQ=&emci=8c88d8d9-4263-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=1dc6990f-4c71-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=18922910)

Dear Peter,

**One of RINO Peter Meijer 's first acts in Congress was voting to impeach President Trump.**

Meijer chose to receive accolades from the fake news media and D.C. swamp over the constitution and conservatives.

That's why I'm running for Congress with Donald Trump's endorsement to make sure RINO Peter Meijer's first term in Congress is his last.

**[Will you join Donald Trump in supporting my campaign to retire RINO Peter Meijer by chipping in a contribution today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59452697:sOStQKHNM:m:1:2365227053:926EDA13EAF95BE8FE9B67ACB7EFEEE1:r)?**

_I knew that fighting for our values wouldn 't win any popularity contests_.

But RINO Peter Meijer chose the easy path of swimming with the currents of the D.C. swamp.

**Not me.**

I say shake it up.

President Trump trusted me to fight for his America First policies, and now President Trump trusts me to fight for his agenda in Congress by endorsing my campaign.

_That trust stands in stark contrast to my opponent_.

Nancy Pelosi knows she can trust RINO Peter Meijer to vote with socialist Democrats when the chips are down.

**[So please join President Trump in supporting my campaign by chipping in your most generous contribution today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59452697:sOStQKHNM:m:1:2365227053:926EDA13EAF95BE8FE9B67ACB7EFEEE1:r).**

John Gibbs

**Peter, one**** year ago, the United States Capitol was under attack.**
We all held our breath as horrific photos and videos from the riot surfaced: a ransacked Senate office, a noose in front of the Capitol, Trump 2020 flags waving high from the balconies. And it now appears that the attack may be traced back to one person: Trump himself.

name: Sheriff Joe Lombardo
subject: Law Enforcement Appreciation Day
body:
Today is Law Enforcement Appreciation Day - an occasion that I don’t take lightly as someone who’s been on the force for over 30 years.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u8HOlngOLgQNPy1VM2CAkdtgBJvCUOiVMantaKU0MYCJ_KsORLs3AfEmLzSQrYw3A6bSCj5qYtcTl3FhC4bS3iV4qOd9am90pKy_mkBHnnZEYQV454aqMJnApVjebRFBfuLFrB2gYhSC3XNR-9DVPNRBw5bcPsKF&c=OQr04VyhndBiARDkN8aF2UyLQecVfwGC8xey5vPiZrxZh0ch5K1lKA==&ch=3t6ULpSbg4WOnuM7R2HzVr5odP7BqY7SQsczmA7r-7A1n3IGzADp1g==)
---
|
---
| Peter,
Today is Law Enforcement Appreciation Day - an occasion that I don't take lightly as someone who's been on the force for over 30 years.
I hope you'll join me in honoring everyone who puts on that badge and steps into the line of duty in order to keep our communities safe. God bless our men and women in law enforcement, and a special thank you to my team of officers here in Clark County!
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u8HOlngOLgQNPy1VM2CAkdtgBJvCUOiVMantaKU0MYCJ_KsORLs3AfEmLzSQrYw3A6bSCj5qYtcTl3FhC4bS3iV4qOd9am90pKy_mkBHnnZEYQV454aqMJnApVjebRFBfuLFrB2gYhSC3XNR-9DVPNRBw5bcPsKF&c=OQr04VyhndBiARDkN8aF2UyLQecVfwGC8xey5vPiZrxZh0ch5K1lKA==&ch=3t6ULpSbg4WOnuM7R2HzVr5odP7BqY7SQsczmA7r-7A1n3IGzADp1g==)
---
| While I work day in and day out to serve my constituents as Sheriff, I'm also right in the thick of a race for Governor here in Nevada that's about something more than politics - it's about keeping Nevadans safe in an increasingly dangerous world.
And I know that mission includes making sure our state's brave police officers and first responders receive the utmost support and appreciation for what they do.
We don't need to hamstring law enforcement with reckless policies like Defund the Police - we need to make sure these heroes have the tools they need to keep us safe!
If you agree, then I hope you'll join me in honoring and appreciating these selfless men and women today.
Happy Law Enforcement Appreciation Day, and I hope you'll take the time to thank a cop in your life!
For Nevada and America, Sheriff Joe Lombardo
---
|
---
| Lombardo for Governor | [Visit our website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u8HOlngOLgQNPy1VM2CAkdtgBJvCUOiVMantaKU0MYCJ_KsORLs3AZW0dWLs1ct5UDNdplkMxQkD2JM_dDdn6VUm68h7W7Pep05NfnQiS_fJXEiKpV0gavzywxWFPkz5Uh3EdvKNAq2beij8j1I-CQ==&c=OQr04VyhndBiARDkN8aF2UyLQecVfwGC8xey5vPiZrxZh0ch5K1lKA==&ch=3t6ULpSbg4WOnuM7R2HzVr5odP7BqY7SQsczmA7r-7A1n3IGzADp1g==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u8HOlngOLgQNPy1VM2CAkdtgBJvCUOiVMantaKU0MYCJ_KsORLs3ARcAKY3-673rcg7WnywOb5uT0DNbeQxby42E-ICzQahhFREGBkayA0lx5V5r_LOBHnPeKa5yGxL-HsQO4Z8eU-UazaNm1Bu3TzbtXLwp_O-b&c=OQr04VyhndBiARDkN8aF2UyLQecVfwGC8xey5vPiZrxZh0ch5K1lKA==&ch=3t6ULpSbg4WOnuM7R2HzVr5odP7BqY7SQsczmA7r-7A1n3IGzADp1g==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u8HOlngOLgQNPy1VM2CAkdtgBJvCUOiVMantaKU0MYCJ_KsORLs3ARcAKY3-673rSvJHYGUxl4-PSQvc2KhxjbS5VgmeFDmNlkWbaOSJjg8zNg8bURCqmoIcEIVbF9MbMtWxBttYetWeTbbgo_OfqDTtFaQvFjT3&c=OQr04VyhndBiARDkN8aF2UyLQecVfwGC8xey5vPiZrxZh0ch5K1lKA==&ch=3t6ULpSbg4WOnuM7R2HzVr5odP7BqY7SQsczmA7r-7A1n3IGzADp1g==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u8HOlngOLgQNPy1VM2CAkdtgBJvCUOiVMantaKU0MYCJ_KsORLs3ARcAKY3-673rBG7nAJqRwbc32R3DAZZg_GJ5eP-nYdJGRMs_h8CAgPaxmYtupNuqrcUoxJqehtIFUw3AwiyHyI7013wG5t_XBVmWqUgE_m4HgsYkBmcJswQ=&c=OQr04VyhndBiARDkN8aF2UyLQecVfwGC8xey5vPiZrxZh0ch5K1lKA==&ch=3t6ULpSbg4WOnuM7R2HzVr5odP7BqY7SQsczmA7r-7A1n3IGzADp1g==)

name: Secretary Mike Pompeo
subject: I've Made A Decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
People keep asking what my plans are for the next election. Well, I've made a decision.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?38xxo--fgxr-4qqlpo7&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-38xxo-1sbz4-4qqlpo9/)
---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I’m 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That’s why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I’m traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I’m staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-38xxo-1sbz5-4qqlpo0/ "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
My time working as President Trump’s Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, I’ve actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That’s made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **

That’s why I am hoping you will **[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-38xxo-1sbz6-4qqlpo1/ "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.")** The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-38xxo-1sbz7-4qqlpo2/)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-38xxo-1sbz8-4qqlpo3/)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

name: Team Mondaire
subject: It’s time to invest in our families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#
Friend,
People shouldn’t have to choose between raising a family and working — but the lack of affordable child care in our country is a barrier for many parents as they look to enter the workforce.
In Westchester County, the average cost of child care for one child is _$2,000_ _a month_. Our child care system is broken and must be fixed in order to continue building our country back better.
Last year, Mondaire played a leading role in ensuring key provisions of a bill he introduced with Elizabeth Warren, the _Universal Child Care and Early Learning Act_ , was included in the _Build Back Better Act_. The result has been that universal child care is the hallmark of President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda.
**[The House did its job by passing the _Build Back Better Act_ , and it's time for the Senate to do the same. Please join Mondaire in calling on the Senate to act now, and get the bill out the door. Add your name to our petition:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40509849/324672683/-1635837517?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMThkZDczMC02NTcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p2vVWtFPkUj9S0AAxBSSbtCKgYcXerb1DYpjZRUt_xQ=&emci=1089f0ae-c86f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=018dd730-6571-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=24719896)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40509850/324672685/-1635837517?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMThkZDczMC02NTcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p2vVWtFPkUj9S0AAxBSSbtCKgYcXerb1DYpjZRUt_xQ=&emci=1089f0ae-c86f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=018dd730-6571-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=24719896)**
The universal child care provisions in the _Build Back Better Act_ will ensure every family has access to high-quality, affordable child care and early learning opportunities by establishing a network of federally supported, locally administered child care options.
Mondaire is fighting to invest in our families and ensure parents who are often forced to stay home can seek employment without being financially burdened.
**[Sign on today to support Mondaire as he urges the Senate to deliver this life-changing legislation for families. We’re optimistic that with your support, we can get this done >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40509851/324672687/-1635837517?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMThkZDczMC02NTcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p2vVWtFPkUj9S0AAxBSSbtCKgYcXerb1DYpjZRUt_xQ=&emci=1089f0ae-c86f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=018dd730-6571-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=24719896)**
Thanks for standing with our team. We’re fighting to advance legislation that provides working- and middle-class families with affordable child care and furthers equity in our communities.
— Team Mondaire

body:
We need to protect our democracy

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40510231/324674575/-1987745334?refcode=licenses&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDhjMmFlMy02NTcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nmT_LdbzdIW-z0MSdSvbMTaLrBzmPt_YkOZeOW2YiiY=) Peter, I’m Florida’s Commissioner of Agriculture and I oversee concealed weapons licensing and the private investigative, security, and recovery services industries. **So far I’ve suspended 28 licenses of individuals charged in the January 6th attack on the U.S. Capitol and our democracy. ** This past week marked one year since the violent attack on our Capitol and on the foundations of our democracy, and reminded us all of the threat that right-wing extremists pose to our safety and our democracy. For the past year, I’ve been doing my part to hold the perpetrators accountable and prevent future attacks on our democracy. Meanwhile, Ron DeSantis has been downplaying the Capitol Riot any chance he gets. **Clearly, our democracy and our safety aren’t worth his attention when they don’t directly benefit his political ambitions. ** [**It’s time we had a Governor who gives a damn about us — a Governor who will take bold action to protect our state and our democracy. body:
Ron Johnson has made it official: He's running for re-election to the U.S. Senate in Wisconsin. We have what it takes to defeat him. **Breaking news: Ron Johnson just announced he’s running for re-election.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40510369/324675372/1928095881?refcode=em22_220109_rojoan_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220109_rojoan_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDBkODA1Ny02NjcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4KoruFezJsji41VNJGb0yK-MvNk9ggt-y-PGd_A-BcU=)
Wisconsin will be the tipping point for Senate control. We are Democrats’ best chance to flip a Senate seat and expand the majority. With Ron Johnson officially in, it’s all hands on deck from here on out to win this race.

The latest poll out of Wisconsin shows Sarah Godlewski is the only Democrat who can beat him. The momentum is clearly on our side, but Mitch McConnell and his dark money network are going to flood millions into Wisconsin to protect Ron Johnson. They’ll surely be spending BIG against us in the coming months, too.

Sarah refuses to take any corporate PAC money in this campaign, which means our team will need every available resource from supporters like you to help us combat the outside attacks that will be heading our way in this race. That’s why we’re asking:

**[Will you rush a donation to our campaign for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin and help us take on the Republicans? If Ron Johnson wins re-election in November, it would be a disaster for Wisconsin and for our country. Your contribution today will fund our efforts to make sure he loses.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40510370/324675373/1928095881?refcode=em22_220109_rojoan_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220109_rojoan_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDBkODA1Ny02NjcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4KoruFezJsji41VNJGb0yK-MvNk9ggt-y-PGd_A-BcU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40510371/324675374/1928095881?refcode=em22_220109_rojoan_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220109_rojoan_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDBkODA1Ny02NjcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4KoruFezJsji41VNJGb0yK-MvNk9ggt-y-PGd_A-BcU=)

name: ICYMI News
subject: Flawed and outdated?
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z32mkq9obg9fifi3dhl8v64fdq2buk1sj19acjs0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4ctgm2o35c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuss0pig8c1uh7gaun4o8lh4q421sd5elvudi320_rp22sh2s8i66ob4ctgm2o35c5h2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvmg8kunkmt2l4hlifr5gpfrk9dtfole2cuql6qo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4ctgm2o35c5h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Candace Owens
subject: [SIGN] Big Tech should NOT silence conservative voices
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59202473:6sjUJoENt:m:1:3253819041:9595FC2CB2BCCB652D4FD0095616C641:r)
---
Peter,

Last week, **Twitter permanently BANNED Dr. Robert Malone** , the world-renowned virologist who **_invented_ the mRNA technology **behind both the Pfizer and Moderna vaccines.

Dr. Malone's crime? **Speaking out _against_ mandating these vaccines for kids.**

Big Tech should NOT silence conservative voices... and Dr. Malone should be reinstated.

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: I want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
With 2022 officially underway, we are entering the next phase of this race
#

There’s a huge difference between our campaign and a lot of the other ones out there:
**We’re powered by working people, for working people.**
That means our campaign isn’t just about me. Our work belongs to everyone who’s part of the team — that includes you, friend!
With 2022 officially underway, we are entering the next phase of this race, and it’s important that we know what issues you care the most about, and which impact your life most directly.
[So I want to hear directly from you today. Will you take our new issues survey to share your input with the team and me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40511481/324680590/-1469703826?refcode2=0e7f3365-6b71-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&refcode=em220109-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTdmMzM2NS02YjcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RvRWH1hjCrxsuW-Z9BzhSJpIoPoCSeJCTY-rHXaIlv0=&emci=0a7f3365-6b71-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=0e7f3365-6b71-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=18034979)
**[BEGIN SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40511482/324680591/-1469703826?refcode2=0e7f3365-6b71-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&refcode=em220109-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTdmMzM2NS02YjcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RvRWH1hjCrxsuW-Z9BzhSJpIoPoCSeJCTY-rHXaIlv0=&emci=0a7f3365-6b71-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=0e7f3365-6b71-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=18034979)**
Make no mistake — we are in a tough race. We’re competing against a crowded field of candidates, and we’re going to have to be as creative and scrappy as possible to stand out.
And I’ll need you on my side every step of the way. That’s why I'm hoping you’ll share your priorities with us today.
Thanks in advance for sharing your feedback. I can’t wait to read your answers.
Malcolm

One year ago today, the MAGA mob, incited by lies spread by Donald Trump, Elise Stefanik, and other extreme Republicans, stormed the Capitol, assaulted police officers, and tried to stop the certification of President Joe Biden’s legitimate victory.

And just hours after the insurrectionists left the building, Elise Stefanik _still_ voted to overturn the results of the free and fair 2020 election.
| [DEFEAT STEFANIK ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40512010/324683408/-852028741?refcode=BLU-PUT-20220109-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjBlYmU5NC02ZDcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KWJjme3PPt7QYGo-k4jEtRgQpc5x_lojIX0NQYiTGWI=)
---
In the past year, Stefanik’s behavior has only gotten more extreme and anti-democratic:
* **Stefanik voted against the select committee to investigate the January 6th Capitol insurrection and calls it a “sham.”** Since the committee’s creation, she has repeatedly voted against its efforts to find answers for the American people about what happened on that day.
* **Stefanik claimed Nancy Pelosi was actually responsible for the insurrection.** This pathetic attempt to gaslight the American people with this absurd claim happened on the same day that Capitol Police officers gave emotional testimony before the House about their traumatic experiences.
* **Stefanik’s campaign promoted an event with an insurrectionist.** The far-right traitor has ties to extremist hate groups and attended the rally that led to the insurrection — but in a tweet promoting the campaign event, she called him an “American Patriot.”

Stefanik’s extremism has paid off big time for her personally this year. She replaced Liz Cheney — who refused to bow to Trump — as the third-ranking Republican in the House and has raised millions in campaign cash.

Today, I am taking time to reflect on one of the darkest moments in our democracy’s history. This tragedy should never have happened, and I’m more determined than ever to make sure that Elise Stefanik is held accountable for her role in the events and the aftermath. [_**I hope you are too. Let’s remove her from office.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40512011/324683412/-852028741?refcode=BLU-PUT-20220109-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjBlYmU5NC02ZDcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KWJjme3PPt7QYGo-k4jEtRgQpc5x_lojIX0NQYiTGWI=)

Together, anything is possible.

Matt

name: Charlie Crist
subject: Ron DeSantis doesn’t care about people.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
The truth is, Ron DeSantis has been chasing far-right policies |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40512376/324685139/409518039?refcode=20220109_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzQ4OGQ0NC02ZTcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jXH1TaG5Nj6UHCsf6A6v-GnslSBYuiVggHxrVHG_WZE=)
---
Friend,

Back in 2009, I was proud to welcome President Obama to Florida to tout the benefits the stimulus package was going to bring to our state. I’m proud of that moment, and of all the work we did with the Obama administration while I was governor to improve peoples’ lives and get Florida back on track during the Great Recession.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40512378/324685141/409518039?refcode=20220109_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzQ4OGQ0NC02ZTcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jXH1TaG5Nj6UHCsf6A6v-GnslSBYuiVggHxrVHG_WZE=)
---
But right now, I’m worried about Florida under Ron DeSantis. As scary as it sounds, he just doesn’t care about people. He cares about looking forward to 2024 and chasing whatever extreme, hot-button issue he thinks will help him win the Republican nomination for president.

That’s why he’s spent so much of his time chasing divisive far-right policies rather than combating COVID-19 and climate change. And it’s why so much of his campaign’s money is coming from billionaires who live out of state and have virtually no connection to Florida.

The truth is Ron DeSantis has failed Florida. Now I’m running for governor to be the people’s voice in Tallahassee and finally start building a Florida that works for ALL Floridians. But I’m going to need your help to do it.

**[If you’re with me, please pitch in anything you can now. Together, I know we can defeat Governor DeSantis and restore common sense, opportunity, and decency to our state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40512381/324685144/409518039?refcode=20220109_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzQ4OGQ0NC02ZTcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jXH1TaG5Nj6UHCsf6A6v-GnslSBYuiVggHxrVHG_WZE=)**

clean_body: The truth is, Ron DeSantis has been chasing far-right policies | | | | = Friend, Back in 2009, I was proud to welcome President Obama to Florida to tout the benefits the stimulus package was going to bring to our state. I’m proud of that moment, and of all the work we did with the Obama administration while I was governor to improve peoples’ lives and get Florida back on track during the Great Recession. = But right now, I’m worried about Florida under Ron DeSantis. As scary as it sounds, he just doesn’t care about people. He cares about looking forward to 2024 and chasing whatever extreme, hot-button issue he thinks will help him win the Republican nomination for president. That’s why he’s spent so much of his time chasing divisive far-right policies rather than combating COVID-19 and climate change. And it’s why so much of his campaign’s money is coming from billionaires who live out of state and have virtually no connection to Florida. The truth is Ron DeSantis has failed Florida. Now I’m running for governor to be the people’s voice in Tallahassee and finally start building a Florida that works for ALL Floridians. But I’m going to need your help to do it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, Charlie = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

**Please, you cannot ignore this, Peter:****New evidence has revealed that sitting GOP lawmakers hatched plans with the Trump White House to steal the election and subvert our democracy.**
**I've said from the beginning that I’m running for Senate because I’m terrified about losing our democracy – and this is _exactly _what I've been talking about: **Politicians who are _currently serving in Congress _were knowingly and blatantly conspiring with Trump to overturn the results of the election! They failed a year ago, but our democracy is still in serious danger right now.
You see, just a year after his failed insurrection, Donald Trump has already kicked off his comeback tour. His eyes are set on 2024, but he knows that first he must take back Congress – and the path to a red Senate runs directly through Iowa. That's why he flew to Des Moines for a massive MAGA rally to endorse my far-right opponent and his top ally, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R).

It's up to grassroots teams like ours to ensure that Trump doesn't take back the Senate and destroy our democracy. With Sen. |
# Law Enforcement Appreciation Day
---
| | |
---|---
|
Hello Peter,

I love our local heroes!!

In honor of Law Enforcement Appreciation Day, I would like to thank all of our local Police Officers and other Law Enforcement Agents for their commitment to our district. While leftists continue to push policies that limit the effectiveness and safety of officers in the line of duty, and policies that are forcing resignation and early retirement in droves, I would like to offer my direct support.

Thank you to those officers who continue to protect and serve our communities and to those who were given no option but to leave the force. I honor your bravery and are grateful for all that you sacrifice to keep our communities safe. I hope you have a happy and healthy 2022! I love our local heroes!!

In honor of Law Enforcement Appreciation Day, I would like to thank all of our local Police Officers and other Law Enforcement Agents for their commitment to our district. While leftists continue to push policies that limit the effectiveness and safety of officers in the line of duty, and policies that are forcing resignation and early retirement in droves, I would like to offer my direct support.

Thank you to those officers who continue to protect and serve our communities and to those who were given no option but to leave the force. I honor your bravery and are grateful for all that you sacrifice to keep our communities safe. I hope you have a happy and healthy 2022!

Charity Barry

clean_body: | | | | == | Law Enforcement Appreciation Day | | | ---|--- | Hello Peter, I love our local heroes!! In honor of Law Enforcement Appreciation Day, I would like to thank all of our local Police Officers and other Law Enforcement Agents for their commitment to our district. While leftists continue to push policies that limit the effectiveness and safety of officers in the line of duty, and policies that are forcing resignation and early retirement in droves, I would like to offer my direct support. Thank you to those officers who continue to protect and serve our communities and to those who were given no option but to leave the force. I honor your bravery and are grateful for all that you sacrifice to keep our communities safe. I hope you have a happy and healthy 2022! I love our local heroes!! subject: FWD: Marjorie Taylor Greene thinks our campaign is a 'threat'
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
Earlier this year, Marcus Flowers was kicked out of an “America First” rally in Dalton, Georgia because he was deemed a “threat” to Marjorie Taylor Greene.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40513208/324689384/-825069922?refcode=20211211_MF_allofus&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjZiYWVjNS03NDcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=briR-mk9gKGiTtH8pU0KQDHkOEvx_OKDgmQMtPGZgs4=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40513209/324689385/-1322419994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjZiYWVjNS03NDcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=briR-mk9gKGiTtH8pU0KQDHkOEvx_OKDgmQMtPGZgs4=&emci=52c2e965-7371-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=d26baec5-7471-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=24979035) Team, did you see the note Marcus sent you yesterday about what happened to him at an “America First” rally earlier this year? He was kicked out because he was perceived to be a ‘threat’ to Marjorie Taylor Greene. _**The truth is, she’s right, but not in the way she thinks. **_ Our _movement_ is a threat to the bigoted politics that her career represents. We’re a threat to the conspiracism, corruption, and authoritarianism that she and Donald Trump espouse.

We’re a threat because we’re focused on delivering roads, bridges, health care, and competence for the American people _[**It’s time to deliver on this “threat” by defeating Marjorie Taylor Greene in 2022. Can you help us do that by donating $20 or more to help our movement grow?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40513210/324689386/-1217423743?refcode=20220109_mf_threatFWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjZiYWVjNS03NDcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=briR-mk9gKGiTtH8pU0KQDHkOEvx_OKDgmQMtPGZgs4=)_ Thanks for your support,
Team Flowers for Congress **\----Begin forwarded message----**
From: Marcus Flowers <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: The real ‘threat’ to Marjorie Taylor Greene
Sent on Saturday, January 8, 2021 Hi, it’s Marcus Flowers. Earlier this year, I was kicked out of an “America First” rally in Dalton, Georgia because I was deemed a “threat” to Marjorie Taylor Greene. The truth is, she’s right, but not in the way that she thinks. I’m not a “threat” to cause a disturbance at a political rally. And I’d never dream of harassing her or anyone else for that matter. _**But our movement -- the one we’re building together -- is most definitely a threat to her political career and that of those who practice her kind of politics.**_ **We’re a “threat” because we still believe that leaders from both parties can work together to oppose bigotry, conspiracy theories, and hatred. ** **We’re a “threat” because we are focused on delivering roads, bridges, health care, and competence for the American people. ** **And we’re a “threat” because we are ready to turn the page on the corrupt leadership styles of Donald Trump, Matt Gaetz, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, and more. ** **[But I need your help to deliver on this “threat.” So today, I’m asking you to donate $20.22 or more to help me defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene in 2022.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40513211/324689387/-1217423743?refcode=20220109_mf_threatFWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjZiYWVjNS03NDcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=briR-mk9gKGiTtH8pU0KQDHkOEvx_OKDgmQMtPGZgs4=) ** | **[DONATE NOW>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40513212/324689388/-825069922?refcode=20220109_mf_threatFWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjZiYWVjNS03NDcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=briR-mk9gKGiTtH8pU0KQDHkOEvx_OKDgmQMtPGZgs4=)**

At 18 years old, I swore an oath to defend the Constitution - and I traveled across the globe defending our democracy.
I’m ready to bring that same passion for public service to the halls of Congress. But I need your help to make it happen.
Thanks for your support,
Marcus Flowers

Marcus Flowers is a Democrat running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. As an Army Veteran, Marcus understands the true meaning of service and patriotism and will work tirelessly to defeat the hatred of the alt-right. **This election is going to be tough, but with the help of grassroots donors like you -- anything is possible.** | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40513213/324689389/-825069922?refcode=20220109_mf_threatFWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjZiYWVjNS03NDcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=briR-mk9gKGiTtH8pU0KQDHkOEvx_OKDgmQMtPGZgs4=)

name: Anne Maher
subject: My husband needs your help
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
Over the last several months, I’ve had a blast meeting so many of Peter’s friends and supporters on the campaign trail. I’ve had incredible conversations with Marylanders about the kitchen-table issues at their homes, at farmers’ markets, on neighborhood main streets, and in restaurants and cafes. But if I haven’t had a chance to meet you yet, I’m Anne, Peter’s wife of 41 years.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie_010722?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie_010722?amount=20.22]Over his decades of service as a Legislator and as Comptroller, I’ve witnessed his incredible commitment to building a brighter future for Maryland’s communities. He’s dedicated his life to public service because he lives by a code to put others before himself, and that’s exactly what he will continue to do as Maryland’s next Governor. He has a transformative vision to combat climate change, make higher education more affordable for students, invest in the next generation of internet connectivity for all communities, and so much more.
Peter is fired up and ready to win the Democratic nomination in June -- but he needs the help of friends like you to bring his message to every community in our state. Right now, Peter and his team are working hard to meet their critical fundraising deadline on January 12. If you believe in Peter’s vision of transformative change and progress, will you chip in to help him meet his fundraising goal ahead of the important upcoming deadline?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie_010722?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie_010722?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie_010722?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie_010722?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie_010722]Every dollar raised will go toward ensuring Peter’s campaign has the resources he needs to win this highly competitive election. We need him as Governor, and we need you to help us reach our fundraising goal to make that happen.
I can’t thank you enough for your continued support of my husband. He is humbled and honored by the trust that you place in him every day, and I know that he will never let you down as Maryland’s next Governor.
Thank you,
Anne
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie_010722?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

name: John Cranley
subject: Under my watch, Ohio won’t be known for political corruption.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
Ohioans need leaders who are ready and able to turn this state around. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40513402/324690297/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.4d9203f4-7571-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.4d9203f4-7571-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDkyMDNmNC03NTcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0EUK2B2abURHcdmXTD_JqMzcX6WXmRTy_GryIr_Q_P0=) Friend, I’m sick and tired of having our state known as a hotspot of political corruption. We used to be a state of manufacturing, of a strong middle class, of presidents and astronauts and opportunity. **Instead, we’ve got elected officials who look out for themselves and their special-interest donors at the expense of hardworking, middle class families.** _**[DONATE TO CLEAN UP COLUMBUS>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40513403/324690299/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.4d9203f4-7571-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.4d9203f4-7571-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDkyMDNmNC03NTcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0EUK2B2abURHcdmXTD_JqMzcX6WXmRTy_GryIr_Q_P0=)**_ We’ve got politicians who would rather ignore the realities of climate change so they can keep raking in money from crooked energy companies. We’ve got a legislature and governor that ignored the will of the voters to gerrymander their way into holding power for the next decade. We’ve had years of Republican-only rule that has left our state without hope. But that can all change in 2022. In 2022 we can choose **big ideas and bold solutions** that will put Ohio back on track — that will bring back jobs and innovation and strengthen our families and communities. **I have those ideas and those solutions, friend, and _I am the candidate who can defeat Mike DeWine next year._** **[If you’re with me, I need you to donate whatever you can to our campaign today. John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

[**Please make a donation today and join Mayor Cranley's campaign to build an Ohio that works for everyone >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40513417/324690313/-1406512299?refcode=ea.4d9203f4-7571-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.4d9203f4-7571-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDkyMDNmNC03NTcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0EUK2B2abURHcdmXTD_JqMzcX6WXmRTy_GryIr_Q_P0=)
