name: David Horowitz
subject: The Enemy Within
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhhlbru541qvhqngbtaj0nmssi4vosant6ghd4e0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpnao9mm9i35ddm6prmdcpkc1r32obme1im8p9h63h32tplmhi69pr2mcpn8thn6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti65j32t5lm9jreoj662ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5i6epb1c3h68oh5u)
America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock you or scare you --_I say it because it’s true._ And I say it with confidence because when I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. **My name is David Horowitz, and 50 years ago I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end.** I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – the largest magazine of the radical Left. I marched, I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam, and my eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left, and dedicated my life to exposing them. I did it because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing, I knew what was at stake, and I knew that if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. **[Today, I’m asking you to join me in this fight, and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $45 or more to my Freedom Center.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zod29s96jsfqc4d2gesnhkoofvgsjghuauvia92g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4ctim2o72chh2bs)** _What we’re seeing today didn’t happen overnight. It’s no coincidence. It’s no stroke of luck._ **It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making.** For decades now, the Freedom Center has been in the trenches, exposing this sinister movement and warning of what was to come. America’s domestic enemies have smeared us every step of the way, and worked around the clock to cut off both political and financial support to silence us for good. We’ve been targeted by MasterCard, DiscoverCard, the Southern Poverty Law Center, and so many more because we’re willing to say and do what no one else would to expose the enemy within. That's why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain what is happening in this battle now – how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of the country... ...how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state, and to cancel, de-platform, and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi63ehl6i1il324v8ua2o9rldnp69qfn9kkdcq98_rp22sh2s8i66ob4ctim2o72chh2bs) **“A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza** **“The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin** **“David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham** I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because I knew that if America stood a chance, Americans had to understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because we’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future -- and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[So if you donate $45 or more to the Freedom Center today](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgr8f4illeajf9dhkuicj6pm7anugloaut8vq8vg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4ctim2o72chh2bs)** and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot, I will send you a complimentary copy _The Enemy Within._ The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make it better — they want to destroy it and make way for their Marxist dystopia. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat, or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to show our fellow Americans who they really are and what they really want while we still can. Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking, and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $45 or more to the Freedom Center today](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdml6rkr1mbh8bld9s0hslk773aivaejkf8l83r0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4ctim2o72chh2bs)** , and as a thank you for your generous support, I’ll reserve a complimentary copy of my latest book _The Enemy Within_ for you, explaining this in depth. [**Get Your Exclusive Copy of _The Enemy Within_**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkk9iqdm1t9h4iev64ldqhdil739r8kfqu5r90dg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4ctim2o72chh2bs) | |

And I say it with confidence because when I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. My name is David Horowitz, and 50 years ago I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – the largest magazine of the radical Left. I marched, I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam, and my eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left, and dedicated my life to exposing them. I did it because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing, I knew what was at stake, and I knew that if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. What we’re seeing today didn’t happen overnight. It’s no coincidence. It’s no stroke of luck. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making. For decades now, the Freedom Center has been in the trenches, exposing this sinister movement and warning of what was to come. America’s domestic enemies have smeared us every step of the way, and worked around the clock to cut off both political and financial support to silence us for good. We’ve been targeted by MasterCard, DiscoverCard, the Southern Poverty Law Center, and so many more because we’re willing to say and do what no one else would to expose the enemy within. That's why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain what is happening in this battle now – how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of the country... ...how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state, and to cancel, de-platform, and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because I knew that if America stood a chance, Americans had to understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I wrote The Enemy Within because I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. I wrote The Enemy Within because we’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future -- and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot, I will send you a complimentary copy The Enemy Within. The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make it better — they want to destroy it and make way for their Marxist dystopia. And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat, or steal to achieve it. So it’s up to patriots like you and me to show our fellow Americans who they really are and what they really want while we still can. Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking, and our country is hanging by a thread. , and as a thank you for your generous support, I’ll reserve a complimentary copy of my latest book The Enemy Within for you, explaining this in depth. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Red tape and insurance nightmares like this are all-too common, and bar many Americans from being able to afford the life-saving care that they need. _**That’s why I support Medicare for All**_. Medical bills are so overwhelming in the U.S. that over a quarter of GoFundMe fundraisers are for medical costs. _The New York Times_ reported that medical debt, totaling $140 billion, is the most common reason for debt collectors to come knocking at your door. **When I’m elected to the U.S. Senate, I’m prepared to fight for Medicare for All, because no family should have to choose between putting food on the table and being able to afford the medical care that they need to survive.[If you’re with me, sign on in support of Medicare for all now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40515214/324699261/475604855?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTQzZDdiZi03ZjcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s6Ew15Fs_yIQq0MszpDIfOin--nz2s9ZK5fvR49yKjE=&emci=442b6736-276f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=4943d7bf-7f71-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=25515813). ** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40515215/324699262/-1840453364?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTQzZDdiZi03ZjcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s6Ew15Fs_yIQq0MszpDIfOin--nz2s9ZK5fvR49yKjE=&emci=442b6736-276f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=4943d7bf-7f71-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=25515813) Opponents of Medicare for All are putting insurance and pharmaceutical companies ahead of people. They disingenuously cite its cost as the reason for their opposition. _This is nonsense_. Numerous economic studies have shown that a single-payer system like Medicare for All would decrease the overall cost of health care in our country, improve health outcomes for patients, and save taxpayers trillions over the next decade. We need leaders who will fight for us, and for a healthcare system driven by a desire to heal people — not by the status quo or the bottom line.

[**Join our movement by signing on to become a citizen co-sponsor of Medicare for All today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40515216/324699263/-1840453364?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTQzZDdiZi03ZjcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s6Ew15Fs_yIQq0MszpDIfOin--nz2s9ZK5fvR49yKjE=&emci=442b6736-276f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=4943d7bf-7f71-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=25515813) Thank you, Dr. Gillian Battino

subject: Taking down Marjorie Taylor Greene
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40515228/324699463/1254848285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjNmOWY1Zi04MDcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fR3HNCM2vS4c85njTya-CoAjjUksO-ee6EPsMHOv-vs=&emci=035db314-7d71-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=423f9f5f-8071-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=23594672) | |

Hey guys, it’s Holly. I just wanted to take a minute to explain why this race is so important before asking for a **[critical donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40515229/324699464/-804235033?refcode=em0109&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjNmOWY1Zi04MDcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fR3HNCM2vS4c85njTya-CoAjjUksO-ee6EPsMHOv-vs=)**.

The last year has been hard on all of us. We all learned that things aren’t “going back to normal.” The new normal is going to be different. New variants are challenging our incredible doctors and nurses, schools may go online for periods of time, and the job market may not look the same as it once did. But somehow, as we are all learning how to move forward in this new normal, **Marjorie Taylor Greene is holding us back**.

We are all hearing the positive news about the economy. Low unemployment, increased spending, higher wage growth. And those are all fantastic developments. But those statistics don’t paint the whole picture. While I am proud of the Biden Administration’s efforts to kick the economy into gear, rural areas are suffering from years of neglect.

Many employees in our district are considered “essential workers”, the bulk of which are farmers and poultry workers. The people in my district make food served on tables across the country. But there’s a troubling number of workers leaving these key industries. And **farms that have operated for generations are shutting down**.

I would love it if our Congresswoman could have these conversations on Capitol Hill. It would be incredible if our Congresswoman sat on committees that could bring attention to these issues. Unfortunately, Marge is jetting off across the country hosting super-spreading fundraisers and spreading misinformation. **She doesn’t sit on any committees and never talks about our communities on the House floors**.

I am reaching out to you today because our rural communities need a voice in Congress, and I intend to be that voice. **[But taking on Marjorie Taylor Greene requires a lot of resources and we need your help. Can you rush a $25 donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40515230/324699465/-804235033?refcode=em0109&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjNmOWY1Zi04MDcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fR3HNCM2vS4c85njTya-CoAjjUksO-ee6EPsMHOv-vs=)**

Help me take back Northwest Georgia.

Thanks for your continued support,
Holly.
****
|

clean_body: | | Hey guys, it’s Holly. I just wanted to take a minute to explain why this race is so important before asking for a =. The last year has been hard on all of us. We all learned that things aren’t “going back to normal.” The new normal is going to be different. New variants are challenging our incredible doctors and nurses, schools may go online for periods of time, and the job market may not look the same as it once did. But somehow, as we are all learning how to move forward in this new normal, Marjorie Taylor Greene is holding us back. We are all hearing the positive news about the economy. Low unemployment, increased spending, higher wage growth. And those are all fantastic developments. But those statistics don’t paint the whole picture. While I am proud of the Biden Administration’s efforts to kick the economy into gear, rural areas are suffering from years of neglect. Many employees in our district are considered “essential workers”, the bulk of which are farmers and poultry workers. The people in my district make food served on tables across the country. But there’s a troubling number of workers leaving these key industries. And farms that have operated for generations are shutting down. I would love it if our Congresswoman could have these conversations on Capitol Hill. It would be incredible if our Congresswoman sat on committees that could bring attention to these issues. Unfortunately, Marge is jetting off across the country hosting super-spreading fundraisers and spreading misinformation. She doesn’t sit on any committees and never talks about our communities on the House floors. I am reaching out to you today because our rural communities need a voice in Congress, and I intend to be that voice. = Help me take back Northwest Georgia. Thanks for your continued support, Holly. | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Holly for Congress Holly McCormack for Congress 862 Lafayette St PO Box 1035 Ringgold, GA 30736 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: American Action News
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog”captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD.
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4ad3576e7b8kek5r3673ess2uh23shcck1hgnco_rp22sh2s8i66ob4ctim1ob2c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkrsqb87ebmt3bcdscpt0er3hnge2qs8cpu9rtt8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4ctim1ob2c9h2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh61gcc2d3cc862h90jl43dgc770lslanfu5juso_rp22sh2s8i66ob4ctim1ob2c9h2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5ldqnjaa0sbvqdr28qc7ap5fcas1te7717rc4p0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4ctim1ob2c9h2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---
American Action News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt8fc58lq8k7iths9q4gi19vc6tl3p3ut2c1heb0_)

The pace of the GOP's vicious scheme has escalated RAPIDLY over the last year.

\-- **FIRST:** Trump spread lies about election fraud and REFUSED to concede to President Biden.
\-- **THEN:** A far-right mob stormed the Capitol on January 6 in an attempted insurrection.
\-- **NOW: GOP officials are ATTACKING voting rights across the country to try and seize power by reducing our ability to vote.**

They've introduced 400 bills to restrict access to the ballot already -- _and they are NOT slowing down!_

That's why Barack and Michelle Obama are fighting to protect voting rights and why we've launched a MASSIVE petition to join them -- ****_but our records indicate you may not_****** _have stood with the Obamas yet, and we're still 7.2% short of our 100,000 signature goal!_**

Radical Democrats are stacking their Soros-funded war chest to make Florida another pawn in their pro-lockdown, anti-American game.

This is an all-hands-on-deck mission. I need your help to fight. Every donation is critical to the future of Florida.
[EXPRESS DONATE $15 NOW ➡](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011Te1rgJ7XH56QsOGhpqCUYU2Hdp-eyDZA86hZyobKGR2UjTo603XbjvrQfoGlUoTPBIj--YkP5VkFz_jniddu_vAaUAHZOrIBnUT5I7bkFS4iqIOw7g8ZZVLF2oUlYTt_D45wGo6pRjPLYU0zxpo9mck3N4HkVFM2UtUrVRQdz2DtZ3B-lUEyUI4YMhyWJeiMPeB2pQgEMw=&c=un7CpseuMdKYcM1OoDMP5EdjpxCX5L4Pbpx45cEfbnmjH5rK1rjMow==&ch=B2byfI4wLvhS37Nf42HgWZi2rHP-DvBOiZ8Mm47Tl5N7_AIvf2nwVA==)

name: Team Booker
subject: Rand Paul’s recent announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

It’s official,
Peter.

Earlier this week, Rand Paul officially announced he’s launching his
re-election campaign to represent Kentucky in the U.S. Senate for another
six years.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14488?refcode=em20220109-1426&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1426%2E346206%2E2O830x ][IMG]

That’s six more years of spreading conspiracy theories and lies that
undermine our democracy. Six more years of holding up legislation like the
9/11 Victims Compensation Fund and the Emmett Till Anti-Lynching Act. Six
more years of using his elected office to trade stocks using insider
knowledge.

Peter, our
country cannot afford six more years of Rand Paul.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14488?refcode=em20220109-1426&amp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1426%2E346206%2E2O830x ]Will you chip in $20.22 or anything you can right now to show Rand
Paul that this grassroots movement is rising up to replace him in 2022? We
have a real chance to flip Kentucky — but we’re relying on supporters like
you to power our voter outreach and organizing efforts.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14488?refcode=em20220109-1426&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1426%2E346206%2E2O830x ]Contribute $20.22

Rand has been representing Kentucky in the U.S. Senate for nearly a
decade. For more than 10 years, he’s had an incredible opportunity to
uplift Kentuckians and bring real change to our commonwealth.

But the only person who's benefited from Rand being in the Senate is Rand.
He’s consistently ignored Kentuckians and our needs. And the sad truth is
that Kentucky has one of the worst records of voter disenfranchisement in
our country’s history which has allowed failed leaders like Rand to stay
in office.

He’s voted against policies that would protect our right to vote, protect
people with preexisting conditions, provide jobs for our communities, and
save lives. Especially now — in the midst of the COVID-19 pandemic — Rand
refuses to lift a finger for the record number of working families who are
struggling to make ends meet and instead whines on Twitter about how
“masks don’t work”.

It's time to elect someone who's the complete opposite of Rand Paul.

Someone who knows what it's like to not have enough money to feed his
family.
Someone who looks at his community and asks, "How can I help?"
Someone who isn't afraid to fight for the right thing even when it isn't
politically convenient.

That’s why we’re reaching out to ask you a favor,
Peter: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14488?refcode=em20220109-1426&amp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1426%2E346206%2E2O830x ]Can you please chip
in $20.22 or anything you can to our campaign right now? It’s important we
show the strength of our grassroots movement now that Rand announced he’s
running for re-election.

Together,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220109-1426-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1426_346206_2O830x&akid=1426%2E346206%2E2O830x

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1426%2E346206%2E2O830x

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

I’ve spent my career fighting for working families, small businesses, survivors of domestic abuse, and the environment while serving in the Maryland General Assembly. It would be an honor and privilege to fight for each and every one of you in Annapolis as your next Lieutenant Governor.
Wes and I are committed to getting to work on Day 1 in office, so we can create **more economic opportunities for all Marylanders, high-quality public education for every student, more affordable health care, and 21st century transportation infrastructure** across the state.
But this is a highly competitive race — one of the most important in the nation in 2022 — and we need all the support we can get to stand out from the crowd and fuel our campaign between now and June’s primary election.
**[So, if you can, pitch in a donation to support Wes and I today. We deeply appreciate it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40516065/324706557/1595534322?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220109aruna_am_60da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjA5MzQwOC04YzcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WCtl0YgckrWfJJz0LV1m7HgcsKn1LWq7JAyoE3qP8Ns=)**

Aruna

| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it.

name: Team Kulla
subject: New year; new variant
body:
Happy New Years, dear readers! I know, I know: after 2020 and 2021, welcoming the new year is hard to do. As you are aware, the omicron variant is sweeping our country and now our beautiful state. | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61db0694a1d2d370414afa61&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D61da4caee568bf66c4cb49c3%26ss_email_id%3D61db0694a1d2d370414afa61%26ss_campaign_name%3DNew%2Byear%253B%2Bnew%2Bvariant%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-01-09T16%253A00%253A59Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=3txoxUpRT9JClo_EBib5gGpZWi0%3D)
---
|
## New year; new variant
---
FIRST! In case you don’t read anything else, here is a link to a new profile published this week in the Eugene Weekly: [The Bridges of Yamhill County](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61db0694a1d2d370414afa61&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.eugeneweekly.com%2F2022%2F01%2F06%2Fthe-bridges-of-yamhill-county%2F&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=J6Q29yzd61gR7nCERz6yZ1-VoXw%3D) (good title, eh?).
---
---
|
---
| _Family walks are COVID-safe fun. (Also must be winter! The Willamette River is up here on Grand Island, filling our lowest fields.)_
---
**Now, a message from Casey:** Happy New Years, dear readers!I know, I know: after 2020 and 2021, _welcoming_ the new year is hard to do. As you are aware, the omicron variant is sweeping our country and now our beautiful state.Thoughts on COVID as an elected official:With the likelihood of our hospitals completely overwhelmed and our nurses already burned out, this variant threatens to push our systems past the breaking point.**Vaccines and boosters remain the best way to avoid hospitalization** , but we can also make sure everyone has rapid tests and high-filtration masks. And, since restrictions appear to be off the table, I have been calling our Governor to pay for COVID quarantine and isolation leave for any resident in Oregon (in addition to distributing masks and tests). COVID will be with us and mutating for the foreseeable future; **this is why we need a Governor with my experience as a public health leader**. We can do this. Thoughts on COVID as a candidate:Meanwhile, here at Team Kulla, we are doing our best to plan and continually re-plan along with the rest of the world to respond to the ways COVID is always changing our work and lives.To that end, I _had_ been planning a series of visits to Coastal, Eastern, Southern, and Central Oregon this winter. Now we’re rethinking what is safe and ways we can have equivalent outreach/connection through other means.So, while we are not going to do in-person events due to the omicron surge, **we will still be on the road and in your neighborhood, dropping off campaign cards and visiting elected officials** (I know a lot of them). Each card will include the link to a virtual event for your community. If you would like to join us to canvass, visit our [volunteer form page](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61db0694a1d2d370414afa61&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2Fvolunteer%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D61da4caee568bf66c4cb49c3%26ss_email_id%3D61db0694a1d2d370414afa61%26ss_campaign_name%3DNew%2Byear%253B%2Bnew%2Bvariant%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-01-09T16%253A00%253A59Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=0NXez5pu_46rSRjyu-MaYQTqnrk%3D) on the website and share your information (be sure to mark “literature dropping/canvassing” so we know how you want to help!).I had also planned a series of visits to Washington and East Multnomah County over the Martin Luther King Jr. holiday weekend. Instead of those soul-satisfying visits to old and new friends, **I will be texting residents to invite your thoughts and your attendance** at a series of virtual listening sessions, too. In fact, in lieu of visits to _everyone_ this winter, **we are also sending out postcards!** If you want to address and mail postcards for the campaign, sign up on the same [volunteer form page](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61db0694a1d2d370414afa61&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2Fvolunteer%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D61da4caee568bf66c4cb49c3%26ss_email_id%3D61db0694a1d2d370414afa61%26ss_campaign_name%3DNew%2Byear%253B%2Bnew%2Bvariant%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-01-09T16%253A00%253A59Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=0NXez5pu_46rSRjyu-MaYQTqnrk%3D) and check “postcards.” And, as you send them, don’t forget to take photos and post on social media (every little bit of exposure helps)!100% COVID-safe campaign fun:Finally, if you need a little fun in your day and you have not yet watched my lineup of videos, pour yourself a cup of warming coffee or tea and visit the [videos page](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61db0694a1d2d370414afa61&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2Fvideos%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D61da4caee568bf66c4cb49c3%26ss_email_id%3D61db0694a1d2d370414afa61%26ss_campaign_name%3DNew%2Byear%253B%2Bnew%2Bvariant%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-01-09T16%253A00%253A59Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=NocwqJvM2B8Lm1GnqpbNrUQMv1I%3D) on my website. I recommend starting with the surfing one, “Bringing us together”!
---
---
| [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61db0694a1d2d370414afa61&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2Fvideos%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D61da4caee568bf66c4cb49c3%26ss_email_id%3D61db0694a1d2d370414afa61%26ss_campaign_name%3DNew%2Byear%253B%2Bnew%2Bvariant%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-01-09T16%253A00%253A59Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=NocwqJvM2B8Lm1GnqpbNrUQMv1I%3D)
---
**Stay safe, stay well.** We’ll get this done.CaseyP.S. Don’t forget to check out the __[_Eugene Weekly_ article](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61db0694a1d2d370414afa61&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.eugeneweekly.com%2F2022%2F01%2F06%2Fthe-bridges-of-yamhill-county%2F&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=J6Q29yzd61gR7nCERz6yZ1-VoXw%3D) too! Share widely!
---
[www.KullaForOregon.com](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61db0694a1d2d370414afa61&u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D61da4caee568bf66c4cb49c3%26ss_email_id%3D61db0694a1d2d370414afa61%26ss_campaign_name%3DNew%2Byear%253B%2Bnew%2Bvariant%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-01-09T16%253A00%253A59Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=N6S6kQoKUyHGzlXmnOF0UllNh0k%3D)
---

name: Conservative Direct
subject: 'Oh my God the irony': Joe Biden somehow keeps a straight face when he reminds Americans that 'you can't love your country only when you win' [video]
body:
\-- Let’s just start out by saying that Joe Biden’s speech today was not as outright terrible as it could have been. He even managed to deliver his remarks largely coherently, which is legitimately refreshing. And, unlike Kamala Harris, he didn’t compare January 6 to Pearl Harbor or 9/11, so that’s good. But if you’re worried that we’re going to sit here and fawn over it, no need to fret. Because this line alone is enough to make your eyes roll right out of your head: He actually said it. With a straight face and everything: Sorry, Joe. But we can’t let this one slide. And we’re not going to. Good Lord. Can anyone help Joe out? STAT! Recommended Twitchy Video |

clean_body: \-- Let’s just start out by saying that Joe Biden’s speech today was not as outright terrible as it could have been. He even managed to deliver his remarks largely coherently, which is legitimately refreshing. And, unlike Kamala Harris, he didn’t compare January 6 to Pearl Harbor or 9/11, so that’s good. But if you’re worried that we’re going to sit here and fawn over it, no need to fret. Because this line alone is enough to make your eyes roll right out of your head: He actually said it. With a straight face and everything: Sorry, Joe. But we can’t let this one slide. And we’re not going to. Good Lord. Can anyone help Joe out? STAT! | | | |
---
| | |
#### Announcement

>From the Desk of Haneefah Khaaliq
# Dear Hoosier,
Primary Election Day is on Tuesday, May 3rd, 2022. In order to make it on the primary ballot, I must acquire 500 registered voters' signatures from each of Indiana's nine (9) congressional districts. Have you signed my petition yet? Here's what I need you to do right now:

1\. Check your voter registration [here](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=13ff3e7eb5&e=a49cb82bb3).

2\. Once you are certain you're a registered voter, visit [haneefahkhaaliq.org](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=2be6ba6707&e=a49cb82bb3) and from the homepage download, print, sign, and send in your uncertified petition to Hoosiers for Haneefah P.O. Box 2936 Gary, IN 46403 to be received by January 20, 2022. It's just that simple!

3\. To save us time, I am now encouraging you to help with the certification process by having your own petition(s) certified before sending it back to the campaign to be received in time for filing. For more instructions on that process scroll down to the section in this email entitled: **_So what's next..._**

4\. Share this email with nine (9) people right now.

Together, we can do this! I'm counting on you. I am Indiana. You are Indiana. Together, we are Indiana!

Sincerely,
Haneefah Khaaliq, Esq.
Candidate for U.S. Senate
Indiana 2022

### _So what's next? _
* I need your signature! We're working hard to get as many signatures now through January 20th. If you haven't already done so, please check your voter registration now by clicking [here](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=5525ea4847&e=a49cb82bb3). You must be a registered voter to have your signature count. Then, visit my website, [download, print, and sign my petition](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=18d3422695&e=a49cb82bb3) from the home page. Get others to sign too!
* **Once you have the petition(s) signed and/or you are done collecting as many signatures as you can (including your own), here's what happens next. Let's dive in: **
* Deliver the uncertified petition(s) to a member of our team or mail the uncertified petition(s) to us at Hoosiers for Haneefah P.O. Box 2936, Gary, IN 46403 to be received by January 20th (2022) or as soon as possible.
* To save time, we are now encouraging you to have your own petition(s) certified at your local county voter registration office or courthouse before sending it back to us to be received by January 20th (2022).
* Locate your county voter registration or courthouse now and make your plan to have your petition(s) certified and sent back to us in time.
* Have questions? Email **hoosiersforhaneefah@gmail.com or call or text 317-999-5592** for petition signing accommodations!
* Check out my [social media](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=9b5938a60c&e=a49cb82bb3) and [donate](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=80155d677a&e=a49cb82bb3) your first $9 now!

Visit haneefahkhaaliq.org for more information.

BREAKING!** [_Georgia Senator Jon Ossoff files the first bill in U.S. history to ever GUARANTEE the voting rights of EVERY American_](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Ossoff_Voting_Rights/?source=VPP_20220109_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=1093%2E878179%2EuyC2t-) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Ossoff_Voting_Rights/?source=VPP_20220109_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=1093%2E878179%2EuyC2t-) | [30,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: STAND WITH JON OSSOFF, PASS THIS BILL!](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Ossoff_Voting_Rights/?source=VPP_20220109_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=1093%2E878179%2EuyC2t-)

Team, Senator Ossoff is AMAZING -- he just filed one of the _most comprehensive voting reform bills in HISTORY!!_

But Republicans are already coming out of the woodwork to keep this bill from going anywhere!

_They’re desperate to keep the loopholes in place so they can keep cheating and WINNING!_

[We need a groundswell of support to get this bill through. PLEASE, ADD YOUR NAME IMMEDIATELY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Ossoff_Voting_Rights/?source=VPP_20220109_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=1093%2E878179%2EuyC2t-)

Thank you,

_VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: 12/31/2021 To: < > Friend, I emailed you. My son, Don, emailed you. Kimberly Guilfoyle emailed you. Team Trump emailed you. And now I 'm emailing you, again. We have a CRITICAL FEC-mandated End-of-Year deadline coming up, and each day when I ask my team who has stepped up, they've never mentioned your name. Why is that, Friend? You've always been a strong ally in the past and this just isn't like you. In a time when Joe Biden is FAILING our Country, your support is needed now more than ever. Today is the FINAL day to contribute towards our goal, so I 've decided to GO BIG and INCREASE your 700%-IMPACT offer to 800%! This offer expires at midnight tonight, Friend. This is your last chance, Friend. Next time I ask my team for an update on who contributed towards our FEC End-of-Year goal, I want to hear your name. - Thank you, Donald J. body:
Last time Trump was here, he told his followers that “taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
#

$3.
That is the donation we are asking you to make before Donald Trump returns to Arizona in just a few days.
Last year, more than 200,000 people contributed to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign. It’s a number we are VERY proud of.
But it’s a different race today. Trump’s visit could change everything.
Last time Trump was here, he told his followers that “taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
Flipping Arizona — a state he’d need if he runs in 2024 — is clearly one of his top priorities right now.
Mark has already faced millions in attack ads, but Trump’s visit is the start of something more. And we need your help to hold this seat. So we’re asking:
[**Can you please make your first $3 donation before Trump’s event in Arizona in just a few days? We have to be ready for what’s next.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-jan22?refcode=em220109-1-7&t=1&refcode2=1907_6688874_jkrlBI&akid=1907%2E6688874%2EjkrlBI)

Our numbers will be out there for everyone from our opponents to pollsters to pundits to voters to judge, and **we can't afford to look vulnerable in a primary this competitive.**

If we can add you to the list of first-time donors, **I know we'll hit this goal. subject: re: big news!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=02b03f3b0fd540af840b625a7ebe03bc&_e=RLbhhQiNvZcrkUWA8QpRTCqdBpHBX3xYVqDXrJFL_l93CIO1RZfa6JGbX5BRQ7Lq8i8caUUZJ7pgvOc7ea8GrGJedIOtX4u7DBAAg6ySyHqu3uvr9bCNAroJnSxMg42GYUa_UDLoLMEml7YvjALr-2irYcApcX6Mop8-mGt_OE8TVDY-sIu_Rdhvy4rINZgvryunwHY6ODNNWMGz8fRqZay9pkJSbZddCeK_XjNEA17QW2u3x2Xlwlg3CJXSNsMchBYp54F3dNA-V2xUuUW7Fo8NgAb0JdbnWHLDhm1vuQ49Hr9rSNoION8iPqGDrwYjNDFQkmVwb8GWrpq3AroI8XNyMk1oGHfGFC5wOCd2pbFUmEvZlWHzWO8-4yY5wnAzQwGVgSpB3E5EWim5sKQ_VkRhhZzy-R04n4Nw_ZxaUrc%3D) | |
---
Friend, in just the last few years, we’ve seen liberal government wreak havoc on our way of life.

From nationwide rioting and violent protests to unconstitutional lockdowns, to mask mandates and record-setting inflation, Americans are facing difficult times.

And an out-of-control, Democrat-led Congress and liberal president in the White House isn’t helping. Instead of providing solutions, they continue to pour billions of taxpayer dollars into pet projects and bad investments.

That’s why today, I’m officially announcing my campaign for reelection to serve the people of Kentucky - and the whole liberty movement - in the Senate for another term.

**[STAND WITH RAND: CHIP IN TO SUPPORT RE-ELECTION >>](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=02b03f3b0fd540af840b625a7ebe03bc&_e=RLbhhQiNvZcrkUWA8QpRTCqdBpHBX3xYVqDXrJFL_l93CIO1RZfa6JGbX5BRQ7Lq8i8caUUZJ7pgvOc7ea8GrGJedIOtX4u7DBAAg6ySyHqu3uvr9bCNAroJnSxMg42GYUa_UDLoLMEml7YvjALr-2irYcApcX6Mop8-mGt_OE8TVDY-sIu_Rdhvy4rINZgvryunwHY6ODNNWMGz8fRqZQcglzipNgwGqW0CFU88FP3OHdWMUGAb7EFQw87p2IytEdowg0PYHIAW0800mMSE1dxpy3zxrJ3u1zi9auQ1xVxeIaQvHHlF7g2VDuBMvm3sm4-ekwuHK3M1xPY1qCdc-_9sUTo0mxqsclReguynTqjCj6qYhWTtvrUbU8B6ajK0fIoTljuiGgXJNHjiSjUATo9bHHtXfX_gst_YwKrW25E%3D)**

I know this race won’t be easy — we have tough challenges ahead.
** **
The bureaucrats in our government, the pro-censorship leaders in big-tech, and the anti-freedom liberals in the media will do anything they can to make sure we don’t succeed.
** **
That’s why I want to start off with a big goal - to make sure we’re prepared for whatever comes next. I’m pledging today to raise $100,000 for the launch of this campaign and I hope you’ll join me by chipping in now.

From nationwide rioting and violent protests to unconstitutional lockdowns, to mask mandates and record-setting inflation, Americans are facing difficult times. And an out-of-control, Democrat-led Congress and liberal president in the White House isn’t helping. Instead of providing solutions, they continue to pour billions of taxpayer dollars into pet projects and bad investments. That’s why today, I’m officially announcing my campaign for reelection to serve the people of Kentucky - and the whole liberty movement - in the Senate for another term. I know this race won’t be easy — we have tough challenges ahead. The bureaucrats in our government, the pro-censorship leaders in big-tech, and the anti-freedom liberals in the media will do anything they can to make sure we don’t succeed. body:
Friend, I’ve served in Iraq and on the frontlines of the COVID-19 pandemic. In the Navy and as a physician, I’ve seen how our politicians have made life harder for everyday Americans. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40517179/324712687/-1044188278?refcode=fl_email_pet_welcome1_kj_new_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2MwNGZiNi05YTcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KvqnpzipXt0bJQ4V50IW76DuLNk6XYcO9cAihluOkmc=)

Friend, I’m Dr. Kermit Jones, and I’m running to represent California’s 3rd District in Congress, which includes Lake Tahoe, and parts of the Sierras and Sacramento suburbs. I’ve served in Iraq and on the frontlines of the COVID-19 pandemic. In the Navy and as a physician, I’ve seen how our politicians have made life harder for everyday Americans. I’ve treated over 20,000 patients in my career and each day I carry their stories with me. Patients who have to choose between paying for prescription drugs and paying rent. Cancer patients, like my mom, who have to sell their family business to afford treatment. Children on ventilators because elected officials lied about the dangers of COVID. **I’m running for these families.** [If you agree we need a representative willing to fight for our right to affordable health care, will you add your name to endorse my campaign for Congress? → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40517180/324712688/-1609933220?refcode=fl_email_pet_welcome_kj_new_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2MwNGZiNi05YTcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KvqnpzipXt0bJQ4V50IW76DuLNk6XYcO9cAihluOkmc=&emci=524f4fa5-306f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=9cc04fb6-9a71-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=16675641) | [ENDORSE KERMIT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40517181/324712689/-1609933220?refcode=fl_email_pet_welcome_kj_new_xx_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2MwNGZiNi05YTcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KvqnpzipXt0bJQ4V50IW76DuLNk6XYcO9cAihluOkmc=&emci=524f4fa5-306f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=9cc04fb6-9a71-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=16675641)

My campaign has already been endorsed by pro-science groups like 314 Action Fund, veterans’ groups like VoteVets and New Politics, and organizations dedicated to electing the Black leaders of tomorrow, like Collective PAC and the Congressional Black Caucus PAC.
Our campaign is catching voter’s attention — but it’s also caught the eye of the GOP.
_Trump promised Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy that he’s going to help the GOP take back the House, and together they’ve already raised over $200,000 to hold this seat._
_**The good news is California’s new maps just made this district 8 points more Democratic, so our chances at flipping this seat are better than ever.**_
[Help us flip this seat and protect the Democratic majority. Join 314 Action, VoteVets, and the Congressional Black Caucus PAC in endorsing our campaign → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40517182/324712690/-1609933220?refcode=fl_email_pet_welcome_kj_new_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2MwNGZiNi05YTcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KvqnpzipXt0bJQ4V50IW76DuLNk6XYcO9cAihluOkmc=&emci=524f4fa5-306f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=9cc04fb6-9a71-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=16675641) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40517183/324712691/-1609933220?refcode=fl_email_pet_welcome_kj_new_xx_btn2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2MwNGZiNi05YTcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KvqnpzipXt0bJQ4V50IW76DuLNk6XYcO9cAihluOkmc=&emci=524f4fa5-306f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=9cc04fb6-9a71-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=16675641)

— Dr. Kermit Jones

The magic number for Republicans in 2022 is _five._ The GOP only needs to flip five seats to take control of the House and pass their far-right legislation.
And folks, it’s looking more and more like **they see NV-03 as one of the five seats they want to flip** and deliver their majority.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6649%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=V%2br0u9HYI2i%2ftJtvr1%2fcMA&sysid=1)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up--that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69503%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ipSz%2f7yB3AUsCqIinDntSg&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69504%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IOekfSv5iZ%2flr7E9wAze0Q&sysid=1)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69515%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8GVHupktRbWc6il3%2bxL5jA&sysid=1) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69516%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BDMsiCaCafWSQG2lb9ZtPw&sysid=1) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

| _Copyright(C) 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6649%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=V%2br0u9HYI2i%2ftJtvr1%2fcMA&sysid=1)_

|
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6649%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=V%2br0u9HYI2i%2ftJtvr1%2fcMA&sysid=1)

Friends, it’s Grace -- Brad’s campaign manager.

My email today is a little different because I’m going to ask for a recurring donation. I don’t often ask this, but now that we are in the election year, I’ll explain why it’s vitally important.

**[So please make sure to read my full note below, and then start a recurring gift of $5 or however much you can afford and multiply your impact today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40517335/324713481/1080040886?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.09_b1_recurring_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&recurring=true&amount=5\]&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.09_b1_recurring_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGFlYzhjOC05ZDcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n9xRhNXvtfvTYmBKV6bZhATmMaJltH06Y1NtrisUFI4=)**

**HERE’S THE SITUATION:** As I write this note to you, we are creating the campaign plans that will allow us to craft a winning campaign and allow us to defeat a Capitol Insurrectionist.

We know we need to hire more staff, put up more campaign ads, train our volunteers and run the most sophisticated digital program Wisconsin has ever seen.

**HOW YOU CAN HELP:** The best way to help us make the most of every opportunity remaining to reach more undecided voters and tip the scales of this election in our favor is by making a recurring donation to our campaign.

Voter outreach is expensive, and grassroots supporters like you are the only ones who can make sure we have the resources we need to succeed.

When we have a recurring donation from you, we know we’ll have enough money in our budget to do these important things. If not, we’ll have to start cutting our budget.

**[Plus, you’ll be able to say you did everything in your power to help elect Brad Pfaff. So don’t wait! Please start a recurring donation of $5 or any amount right here »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40517336/324713482/1080040886?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.09_b1_recurring_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&recurring=true&amount=5\]&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.09_b1_recurring_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGFlYzhjOC05ZDcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n9xRhNXvtfvTYmBKV6bZhATmMaJltH06Y1NtrisUFI4=)** | [GIVE $5 MONTHLY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40517337/324713484/1080040886?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.09_b1_recurring_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&recurring=true&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.09_b1_recurring_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGFlYzhjOC05ZDcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n9xRhNXvtfvTYmBKV6bZhATmMaJltH06Y1NtrisUFI4=)

| | Folks, The Republican Party takes control of the House of Delegates in just four days but we don’t have to wait until then to see what they have planned for the future of democracy in our Commonwealth. Every major piece of legislation that the Democratic majority passed to expand the right to vote already has a bill filed by the new Republican majority aiming to repeal it: Voter ID, restricting early voting days, getting rid of dropbox locations, and ending no-excuse absentee voting. Since these bills have become law in Virginia, we have seen record turnout among both parties, but there is reason to this Republican rhyme - while expanding the right to vote helps both parties, voter suppression only helps one. **This is the gambit they’re running to take and hold power across the country, and Youngkin and his new majority are bringing it here to Virginia. name: Great America Update
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6641%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=KYHlqG9AftiJ6csZv55rIQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69519%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pS37ShZZ0Eu91qJsmzgKDg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69510%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Tm12nLFk2Zcxbig96wa5ng&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69511%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Yd%2fs8h%2fYa0UG%2fbvaOHbm3g&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

body:
Greg Abbott is buying his first TV ads. How we respond today is critical.
#
Greg Abbott is _officially_ going up on air with his very first TV ads.
The news reports indicate they’re going to blanket the _entire_ state with these ads — a move that could cost millions in a big state like Texas.
We started this race with $0 when Greg Abbott already had $55 million.
It’s true that they can advertise earlier and more than us at this point. But, we have the power to change that if we pick up the pace on grassroots donations right now.
[**Donate $3 now to counter Greg Abbott’s influx of TV ad money. Every dollar helps us inch closer so that we don’t get drastically outspent.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51557?refcode=ema20220109-170465&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=170465%2E444211%2EY-7vm-)

Let’s show Greg Abbott what we’re made of today. Yes, he’s got tens of millions of dollars from special interests and big business in the bank. But, we’ve got something better: hundreds of thousands of energetic and savvy donors and volunteers all across the country. Together, Team Beto can go toe-to-toe against Abbott’s Big Money — and win.
Thanks for everything,
Team Beto

body:

Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently banned from Twitter for spreading disinformation about COVID-19 and putting her followers at severe risk.
We welcome her removal from Twitter -- but the next step is to remove her from office. Can you donate $20 or more now to help us do just that? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marcus Flowers is a Veteran, a patriot, and a Democrat -- and he’ll restore honor and integrity to Congress.
Thanks for your support.
---- Begin forwarded message ----
From: Marcus Flowers <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene was permanently suspended from Twitter
Sent on Sunday, January 2, 2022 at 1:05 p.m.
It’s official: Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently suspended from Twitter.
She deserved to be removed from the platform because of her dangerous incitements to violence and reckless spreading of harmful disinformation.
But here’s the thing: Our goal was never to get Marjorie Taylor Greene removed from Twitter. Our goal is to remove her from Congress.
I’m a Veteran, a Democrat, and I believe that the people of Georgia’s 14th District deserve so much better than Marjorie Taylor Greene. That’s why I’m running to unseat her in 2022.
So I have to ask: Will you join me in the fight to remove her from Congress by donating $20 or more to my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been removed from Twitter -- that’s a good thing. But let’s not pretend that was our goal. We have to remove her from office.
Thanks for fighting with me,
Marcus Flowers

name: Nate Sandvig for Congress
subject: Back the Blue Petition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sandvig for Congress
body:
Show where YOU stand on National Law Enforcement Appreciation Day!
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/d1b1342e83550884/642c1e39c7c78081c3d6b838967d376c/37283)
---
Friends,

In recent years, we’ve seen far-left politicians at every level cave to the “woke” mob.

The “Defund the Police” insanity that’s taken hold in major cities across America has been a DISASTER, leading to a tragic record-shattering spike in violent crime. In Portland, we’ve seen officers leave the force in massive numbers, citing lack of community support and exhaustion from excessive hours in exit interviews.

Now, the same people who wanted to defund law enforcement are now backpedaling, asking for more money for police as they come under pressure from fed up citizens!

**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. Nate is proud to stand our men and women who protect and serve, and is 100% committed to ensuring they have the resources they need to do their jobs.**

Today, as we celebrate National Law Enforcement Appreciation Day, we want to give you the opportunity to show where you stand.

[**Take a moment now to add your name to our Back the Blue petition >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/d1b1342e83550884/65c11e8e9782ce2ec3d6b838967d376c/37283)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/d1b1342e83550884/57e2359b472b5e65c3d6b838967d376c/37283)
---
Our police officers in the toughest places, like Portland, feel abandoned.

Let show them, and law enforcement officers across Oregon, that we support them, appreciate all they do to keep our communities and families safe, and are standing behind them to STOP the “Defund the Police” agenda.
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress
body:
Friend, I’ve served in Iraq and on the frontlines of the COVID-19 pandemic. In the Navy and as a physician, I’ve seen how our politicians have made life harder for everyday Americans. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40517552/324714748/-1044188278?refcode=fl_email_pet_welcome1_kj_new_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGYwNWFmMi05ZjcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JbubgFlCkpck_Q7j5DEqGh6qixFlalWoAlDAnq12VIg=)

Friend, I’m Dr. Kermit Jones, and I’m running to represent California’s 3rd District in Congress, which includes Lake Tahoe, and parts of the Sierras and Sacramento suburbs. I’ve served in Iraq and on the frontlines of the COVID-19 pandemic. In the Navy and as a physician, I’ve seen how our politicians have made life harder for everyday Americans. I’ve treated over 20,000 patients in my career and each day I carry their stories with me. Patients who have to choose between paying for prescription drugs and paying rent. Cancer patients, like my mom, who have to sell their family business to afford treatment. Children on ventilators because elected officials lied about the dangers of COVID. **I’m running for these families.** [If you agree we need a representative willing to fight for our right to affordable health care, will you add your name to endorse my campaign for Congress? → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40517555/324714749/-1609933220?refcode=fl_email_pet_welcome_kj_new_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGYwNWFmMi05ZjcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JbubgFlCkpck_Q7j5DEqGh6qixFlalWoAlDAnq12VIg=&emci=8e881721-8611-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=a4f05af2-9f71-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=16675641) | [ENDORSE KERMIT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40517556/324714751/-1609933220?refcode=fl_email_pet_welcome_kj_new_xx_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGYwNWFmMi05ZjcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JbubgFlCkpck_Q7j5DEqGh6qixFlalWoAlDAnq12VIg=&emci=8e881721-8611-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=a4f05af2-9f71-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=16675641)

My campaign has already been endorsed by pro-science groups like 314 Action Fund, veterans’ groups like VoteVets and New Politics, and organizations dedicated to electing the Black leaders of tomorrow, like Collective PAC and the Congressional Black Caucus PAC.
Our campaign is catching voter’s attention — but it’s also caught the eye of the GOP.
_Trump promised Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy that he’s going to help the GOP take back the House, and together they’ve already raised over $200,000 to hold this seat._
_**The good news is California’s new maps just made this district 8 points more Democratic, so our chances at flipping this seat are better than ever.**_
[Help us flip this seat and protect the Democratic majority. Join 314 Action, VoteVets, and the Congressional Black Caucus PAC in endorsing our campaign → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40517558/324714752/-1609933220?refcode=fl_email_pet_welcome_kj_new_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGYwNWFmMi05ZjcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JbubgFlCkpck_Q7j5DEqGh6qixFlalWoAlDAnq12VIg=&emci=8e881721-8611-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=a4f05af2-9f71-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=16675641) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40517559/324714754/-1609933220?refcode=fl_email_pet_welcome_kj_new_xx_btn2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGYwNWFmMi05ZjcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JbubgFlCkpck_Q7j5DEqGh6qixFlalWoAlDAnq12VIg=&emci=8e881721-8611-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=a4f05af2-9f71-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=16675641)

clean_body: Friend, I’ve served in Iraq and on the frontlines of the COVID-19 pandemic. In the Navy and as a physician, I’ve seen how our politicians have made life harder for everyday Americans. | = Friend, I’m Dr. Kermit Jones, and I’m running to represent California’s 3rd District in Congress, which includes Lake Tahoe, and parts of the Sierras and Sacramento suburbs. I’ve served in Iraq and on the frontlines of the COVID-19 pandemic. In the Navy and as a physician, I’ve seen how our politicians have made life harder for everyday Americans. I’ve treated over 20,000 patients in my career and each day I carry their stories with me. Patients who have to choose between paying for prescription drugs and paying rent. Cancer patients, like my mom, who have to sell their family business to afford treatment. Children on ventilators because elected officials lied about the dangers of COVID. I’m running for these families. | My campaign has already been endorsed by pro-science groups like 314 Action Fund, veterans’ groups like VoteVets and New Politics, and organizations dedicated to electing the Black leaders of tomorrow, like Collective PAC and the Congressional Black Caucus PAC. Our campaign is catching voter’s attention — but it’s also caught the eye of the GOP. Trump promised Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy that he’s going to help the GOP take back the House, and together they’ve already raised over $200,000 to hold this seat. The good news is California’s new maps just made this district 8 points more Democratic, so our chances at flipping this seat are better than ever. This is going to be a tough battle, but I’m used to those — and this one is worth it. As the Navy saying goes, “non sibi sed patriae: not self, but country.” — Dr. Kermit Jones | Kermit Jones is a Democrat, doctor, and Navy veteran running for Congress in California. = | = | Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress Kermit Jones for Congress PO Box 713 Roseville, CA 95661 United States Kermit Jones is a former member of the U.S. Navy. name: Team WisGOP
subject: 🚨 Senator Johnson is RUNNING! 🚨
body:
Let’s get to work to re-elect him.

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=johnson_announcement_v3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend -- The news is OUT! **Senator Johnson is running for re-election in 2022, and we need to do everything we can to make sure to re-elect him.** Read his press release below: Since taking office, he has fought business as usual in Washington and his courage to stand up for what’s right has served Wisconsin well. **America needs a check on the failed policies of the Biden administration – and Wisconsin will make sure that happens by sending Ron Johnson’s independent leadership back to Washington.** You can help by [**splitting a donation**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVBc3m2irbPb_ULq5yjDAjwy4QnAbx8tDlkQ9lH3lXYoY&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=johnson_announcement_v3&n=2) between the Republican Party of Wisconsin and Senator Johnson’s campaign right now, or by signing up to [**volunteer**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0UGXsZyxDn4eAZJlNmM9uI4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=johnson_announcement_v3&n=3) and joining our grassroots army. We know that outside liberal groups are going to do everything they can to stop Senator Johnson from winning again, and millions of dollars will pour in from liberal elites in New York and California. That’s why it’s all hands on deck for Republicans to ramp up our ground game and make sure we have the manpower and resources to win. We hope you’ll join us! \- Team WisGOP | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVBc3m2irbPb_ULq5yjDAjwy4QnAbx8tDlkQ9lH3lXYoY&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=johnson_announcement_v3&n=4 "SPLIT A DONATION") [SPLIT A DONATION](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVBc3m2irbPb_ULq5yjDAjwy4QnAbx8tDlkQ9lH3lXYoY&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=johnson_announcement_v3&n=4)

body:
I come from a family that knows the meaning of hard work
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40517697/324715373/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk553-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTkyYTE4Zi1hMDcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IymaknLgrkJ06k7K-NGbo3SFXYG9o41DefAqDBSVl6I=)
Peter: I know that you've heard from me a lot recently about our race to defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA) – but today I have a special story to tell you and I hope you'll take a moment to read it.
If you know anything about Iowa politics, you know that we take our presidential caucuses – and all the festivities leading up to them – very seriously. So, back in 2019, when I had eight Democratic candidates and hundreds of voters attending my Finkenauer Fish Fry event, there was a bit of pressure, to say the least. People were going to be eager to talk politics – and just as eager to eat.
Thankfully, I come from a family that knows the meaning of hard work – and the importance of showing up for each other when we need it.
So when I asked for my mom's help, she was there. **My mom baked nearly 1,000 cupcakes for our guests – chocolate, pumpkin, red velvet, you name it.** And when she ran out of space to store them in our freezer, she used my dad's pickup truck, the cold weather and some classic Iowan problem-solving to improvise a second freezer to fit them all.
But trust me, 1,000 cupcakes are nothing compared to everything my family has done for me – I wouldn't be where I am today without them. They taught me the value of hard work and the power of a scrappy, passionate team. **That's how I became the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue – and it's how I'm going to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley to become the youngest woman elected to the Senate.**
Listen, the numbers are on our side: Nearly two-thirds of voters here don't want to reelect Sen. Grassley. We can win but only with hardworking people like you who care about flipping this seat blue, fighting for working families and protecting our Senate majority. **[That's why today I'm asking you to make a contribution to my campaign of $5, or whatever you can spare, so that we have the resources to defeat Sen. Grassley, bring new leadership to Iowa and protect our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40517698/324715374/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk553-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTkyYTE4Zi1hMDcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IymaknLgrkJ06k7K-NGbo3SFXYG9o41DefAqDBSVl6I=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40517699/324715375/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk553-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTkyYTE4Zi1hMDcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IymaknLgrkJ06k7K-NGbo3SFXYG9o41DefAqDBSVl6I=)
---
I know that we're going to win this thing – one dollar, or one cupcake, at a time. Thank you for standing with me.

– Abby

subject: Trump’s return BACKFIRES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **NEW YORK TIMES REPORT:**
_**Trump hosts $125,000-per-person fundraiser at Mar-a-Lago**_

[**We 're on high alert. _The New York Times_ just reported that Trump is hosting HUGE fundraisers for his top mega-donors at Mar-a-lago - with tickets selling for $_125,000_ per person. With our Democratic Trifecta already on the verge of collapse, we CANNOT let Trump's Republicans gain the upper hand - and this kind of fundraising spree could sink us for good. That's why we're calling on 1,250 of our best Democrats to rise up in MASSIVE numbers to turn the tide before our Majority is LOST. Will you rush in $3 right now to elect House Democrats? >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/p28-)

**Everything just changed.**

We just learned Donald Trump will be hosting one of the BIGGEST fundraisers of the year at his Mar-a-Lago mansion.

**Here 's the hard truth:** We're already struggling to keep up with Trump's mega-donors and the millions they pump into the GOP war chest.

But we have something they don't: _**You.**_

In 2020, Democrats won the most consequential House Majority in HISTORY because of the grassroots donors who stepped up to power our campaign for change:

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/78ZXTZ_)

_With the stakes even higher in 2022, we need to show we have what it takes to overcome the GOP 's mega-donor millions._

[**That 's why we're asking you personally: Can you rush in $3 or more now to defend our historic House Majority and hand Trump's Republicans a stunning defeat?**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_)
| | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Thank you,

DCCC
