body:
It’s National Law Enforcement Appreciation Day and I need your help to say thank you | |
---

[](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=c0fa33ce7d5849a0ab04d195f1365f14&_e=1t-WBoNN4rZ19BFZKy2FfMnlyuLjSGCM8_Y9I-9IWB92s9Q-ogxYwZR9sIZyXlQQUO9zNIRSkkyFidnbFinXyC2KiNp8crZjx4IGAumsA38YfXC86y38iUPvcgRTCUy11kMX07be-OMQ_Qbw9lpjqMyRbLaiiaq1liS7bY06WgBu6QlhRNyKMlVHsD646OMqsyAFIMe-wKfBkivdHdSs8bPKIFZ0B71GBQylgpkL1ebvC646whYa5YREr7PYFA0gLvtM-oLBpp_Iy7n2derxVjAE-Zju5LMcwlRHRRAE64cg0Yko3FSmhQD-CMtxM1N0AKhfreMjquVAzPX_4rYFgaZVZh_xzPONpxokw8PdZn0cbwsjLgYWvJj-EdVivIJy_kKB2-yAYkTkj92TqQkVo0-NvrBiDmea6IiATyhpIXRW_6NlHfBR3jvO5AF6D1oM1RKUdcrznyLixWzAVu8-zu9jFDasY1PCd8Own7mP3j926a7lNO34q6g_WqABMUUn)

|

Peter,

We owe a lot to the men and women in blue who sacrifice to protect and serve Nevada.

There’s nothing more honorable than risking one’s life to save others –– and that’s just a regular day on the job for a police officer.

**Today is National Law Enforcement Appreciation Day and I need your help to say thank you to our police.**[_**Can you sign our thank you card?**_](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=c0fa33ce7d5849a0ab04d195f1365f14&_e=1t-WBoNN4rZ19BFZKy2FfMnlyuLjSGCM8_Y9I-9IWB92s9Q-ogxYwZR9sIZyXlQQUO9zNIRSkkyFidnbFinXyC2KiNp8crZjx4IGAumsA38YfXC86y38iUPvcgRTCUy11kMX07be-OMQ_Qbw9lpjqMyRbLaiiaq1liS7bY06WgBu6QlhRNyKMlVHsD646OMqsyAFIMe-wKfBkivdHdSs8bPKIFZ0B71GBQylgpkL1ebvC646whYa5YREr7PYFA0gLvtM-oLBpp_Iy7n2derxVjAE-Zju5LMcwlRHRRAE64cSlKmnKuJNH6z-WH4UB-Nmo-K8kR9J0SMp85pRbDPmioNBuPE-mhliK6vmhtw6I8utFE6cXmkHWe_bHvsFvPDtVDKnxNvnrkRUY7wnQuErBQmoyCForAE9foEJIQqiXG5vOt8qkTZyUprVsMPg3zXtfIPFgZYsp1wJxv3M-QPNiYYje8Io2QPbqpHlPYpFGdpcgLuUr5qteg64gER4Dl7X)

[](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=c0fa33ce7d5849a0ab04d195f1365f14&_e=1t-WBoNN4rZ19BFZKy2FfMnlyuLjSGCM8_Y9I-9IWB92s9Q-ogxYwZR9sIZyXlQQUO9zNIRSkkyFidnbFinXyC2KiNp8crZjx4IGAumsA38YfXC86y38iUPvcgRTCUy11kMX07be-OMQ_Qbw9lpjqMyRbLaiiaq1liS7bY06WgBu6QlhRNyKMlVHsD646OMqsyAFIMe-wKfBkivdHdSs8bPKIFZ0B71GBQylgpkL1ebvC646whYa5YREr7PYFA0gLvtM-oLBpp_Iy7n2derxVjAE-Zju5LMcwlRHRRAE64eTidU5SmH-w07hQ4mcs1Y_BNbF0eeXRSwSHbVg4cfKSkX-7gk2YDUhXoforE6mw59LAJd4pLUumJhNS4LtTAoAikJ6bEj-31P1DEW-wSHQk-lu1E3xCNKBRW0tlL8iSJ5V50h95aCN7BNsjsTR72Rfg0U5WtnC_P44-CB1ZR0nDuQ5kVmjgL_Xx2gJeZEV-gKD01pzxQgjKueMBIo74xsf)

Our police have gone above and beyond in recent years to combat an alarming spike in violent crime. It’s happening here in Nevada and all over the country.

_Meanwhile, our leaders are siding with criminals who terrorize our communities over the cops who uphold law and order._

**Nevada’s police deserve a Governor who will back the blue 100% and give them the support they need to do their jobs. That’s why I’m in this race.**

[**_Will you take a second to sign our campaign’s thank you card today?_**](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=c0fa33ce7d5849a0ab04d195f1365f14&_e=1t-WBoNN4rZ19BFZKy2FfMnlyuLjSGCM8_Y9I-9IWB92s9Q-ogxYwZR9sIZyXlQQUO9zNIRSkkyFidnbFinXyC2KiNp8crZjx4IGAumsA38YfXC86y38iUPvcgRTCUy11kMX07be-OMQ_Qbw9lpjqMyRbLaiiaq1liS7bY06WgBu6QlhRNyKMlVHsD646OMqsyAFIMe-wKfBkivdHdSs8bPKIFZ0B71GBQylgpkL1ebvC646whYa5YREr7PYFA0gLvtM-oLBpp_Iy7n2derxVjAE-Zju5LMcwlRHRRAE64dfg6ocwsPeoIeEfWWjTPY5a65tnPWW_mjENGC6YePbmeGT0gQT8r3bIq34g661nxNKQ6RKwoNb4YuiaVNytPdjuA0lOoQ6KoHzrZlRNMwIqEJo7crtITN0jZWUPOpay9zSQfeGlSJp-BtWXQCt7knW389OnlfEQKDMclA_R2l6Fr2YQFp2WaK4Hh8jpqUWHqAQEfkGxHckf6NMF8x6SVnR)
[**THANK OUR POLICE**](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=c0fa33ce7d5849a0ab04d195f1365f14&_e=1t-WBoNN4rZ19BFZKy2FfMnlyuLjSGCM8_Y9I-9IWB92s9Q-ogxYwZR9sIZyXlQQUO9zNIRSkkyFidnbFinXyC2KiNp8crZjx4IGAumsA38YfXC86y38iUPvcgRTCUy11kMX07be-OMQ_Qbw9lpjqMyRbLaiiaq1liS7bY06WgBu6QlhRNyKMlVHsD646OMqsyAFIMe-wKfBkivdHdSs8bPKIFZ0B71GBQylgpkL1ebvC646whYa5YREr7PYFA0gLvtM-oLBpp_Iy7n2derxVjAE-Zju5LMcwlRHRRAE64eIFbHlw_95U-LkhEdAMkulz8yX2kqdES7meQP9pXJHRzfwtjxG4hIQ6KrF0bLoriB86ORFxm0biCHVtp77BYoWoXmBdssNpsp0zGr0h27W5YYsoAqV7L0NKL4KsjlPIGrBQZ0CfQpvHcWRbu1nEd4ur93lBype_qXZEzv3G1KZZSsTKwQY6UPSWkIFMSPDFh32nV3jBvZEfC8X0Worj9fq)
Thanks,
Dean Heller

Hello everyone,
My husband Michael and I had the privilege of serving our nation together for almost three decades.
Different schools, new doctors, different commute, pack up and unpack, good-byes to old friends and hellos to new neighbors — we moved from state-to-state and overseas. I didn’t know married life to a naval officer would be so busy or so enriching when we married in 1989. (Yes, I would do it over again!)
As a family, we were better for it. Our children saw many new schools, sometimes as many as three in a single year, and they were accepting of those disruptions to their lives. Deployments were made more tolerable when email came along, but Michael’s absence was always felt around the dinner table, on holidays, and during family events.
**No challenge we faced these last three decades, though, compares to the demands of running for the U.S. Senate.** Yet this is exactly why my husband is undertaking this next level of service — because he has consistently made the impossible look doable and the difficult look commonplace. If anyone can beat Chuck Grassley, he can do it. My sense is that the nation needs people like him.
Admiral Michael Franken, my hubby, is the right person to be Iowa’s next Senator. I believe in him, and I know he will wow you, as well. His soul is Iowa’s. **But if Mike is going to win, turn Iowa blue, and fix the many challenges Iowa, its citizens, and this nation face, he needs your help today.**
**Getting his message before every Iowa voter will take significant funding, especially against a 46-year incumbent like Chuck Grassley who has the backing of corporate PACs and special interests.** [**Please, can Mike count on you to make a donation right now to his campaign and help him defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect the Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40518189/324718098/-42398318?refcode=em20220109pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmRmYzIzZC1hODcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JPVLSQjw_liRvq5LRLvpseUGlSXWxAYJtJV1jEPRdSY=)

clean_body: = Hello everyone, My husband Michael and I had the privilege of serving our nation together for almost three decades. Different schools, new doctors, different commute, pack up and unpack, good-byes to old friends and hellos to new neighbors — we moved from state-to-state and overseas. I didn’t know married life to a naval officer would be so busy or so enriching when we married in 1989. (Yes, I would do it over again!) As a family, we were better for it. Our children saw many new schools, sometimes as many as three in a single year, and they were accepting of those disruptions to their lives. Deployments were made more tolerable when email came along, but Michael’s absence was always felt around the dinner table, on holidays, and during family events. No challenge we faced these last three decades, though, compares to the demands of running for the U.S. Senate. Yet this is exactly why my husband is undertaking this next level of service — because he has consistently made the impossible look doable and the difficult look commonplace. If anyone can beat Chuck Grassley, he can do it. My sense is that the nation needs people like him. Admiral Michael Franken, my hubby, is the right person to be Iowa’s next Senator. I believe in him, and I know he will wow you, as well. His soul is Iowa’s. But if Mike is going to win, turn Iowa blue, and fix the many challenges Iowa, its citizens, and this nation face, he needs your help today. Getting his message before every Iowa voter will take significant funding, especially against a 46-year incumbent like Chuck Grassley who has the backing of corporate PACs and special interests. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’ve seen Michael completely at ease when speaking with international leaders and just as easily as the farmers he worked for some 45 years ago. He is the most engaging, level-headed, smart, and practical person I’ve ever known. He is a remarkable man with an unbelievable ability to get things done. But at this stage of the campaign, Mike’s candidacy will be measured and scrutinized by how much campaign funds he can raise. Please help Iowa get a Senator the state needs. subject: the GOP clown car

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1961%2E3611125%2E9rp6Oj ][IMG]

Hi folks, my name is Izzi. I’m Tim Ryan’s Communications
Director and hoo boy, do I have some news for you:

Scooch in because polls are getting tighter in the Ohio GOP’s clown car of
a primary.

The Republican primary field is jam-packed with out-of-touch extremists
who couldn’t be more wrong for Ohio. They’re begging for Trump’s
endorsement and all set to outspend each other to buy this Senate seat on
behalf of their wealthy allies.

They know what we know: Mitch McConnell’s chance at taking back the Senate
gavel depends on what happens here in Ohio. And whether we win or lose
could depend on you:

Recent polling shows we’re neck-and-neck with our GOP opponents. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6417?t=1007&akid=1961%2E3611125%2E9rp6Oj ]Can
you chip in to help us flip this open seat blue and show Tim’s opponents
that this Senate seat can’t be bought?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6417?t=1008&akid=1961%2E3611125%2E9rp6Oj ]Donate >>

There’s no room for error here—we’ve got to expand our Senate majority or
working families will pay the price.

But here’s the issue: Tim’s millionaire Republican opponents have the
backing of wealthy billionaires—JD Vance has the help of Peter Thiel’s $10
million super PAC while Mike Gibbons just announced a $10 million ad buy.

The GOP’s clown car would take Ohio down the wrong road. It’s time to make
a U-turn and cut workers in on the deal. To do that, we need your help.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6417?t=1009&akid=1961%2E3611125%2E9rp6Oj ]Can we count on you to chip in and show the GOP that we’re ready to
take on their attacks, flip this Senate seat blue, and expand the

—Izzi

name: Team Padilla
subject: Which issues are most important to YOU, personally, heading into 2022?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Here's why we're asking:
#

We’re reaching out today to ask a quick — but very important — question:
[**Which issues are most important to YOU, personally, heading into 2022?**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/January-Issue-Survey-2022-em/?source=em220109-1-60&refcode2=574.159979.74z7iq&akid=574%2E159979%2E74z7iq)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/January-Issue-Survey-2022-em/?source=em220109-1-60&refcode2=574.159979.74z7iq&akid=574%2E159979%2E74z7iq)**
Here's why we're asking:
We have a lot of dedicated supporters like you across California and across the country, but winning this race will require not just turning out the people who’ve already said they support Alex, but introducing him to newer voters and convincing currently undecided voters he’s the best person for the job.
And by getting a better sense of which issues motivate _you_ to support Alex, we can more effectively make the case to others about why _they_ should support Alex.
So, this will make a big difference to our campaign, and it’ll only take a few minutes. What do you say?
[**Take our short survey: Tell us which issues motivate you to support Alex’s campaign.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/January-Issue-Survey-2022-em/?source=em220109-1-60&refcode2=574.159979.74z7iq&akid=574%2E159979%2E74z7iq)
Thank you so much for sharing your thoughts with us, and have a great rest of your Sunday!
\- Team Padilla
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/January-Issue-Survey-2022-em/?source=em220109-1-60&refcode2=574.159979.74z7iq&akid=574%2E159979%2E74z7iq)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=574%2E159979%2E74z7iq)

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: $4 MILLION in TV ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Dr. Oz is putting MILLIONS of his own cash into TV ads.
#
Derek,
According to the latest reports, Dr. Oz has now booked $4 MILLION total in TV ads to try to buy this senate seat.
And with a reported net worth of $100 million, Dr. Oz could spend virtually *unlimited* sums to keep Pennsylvania red. 🔴
**This is a pivotal moment for our campaign, Derek.** We either give into the intimidation of another self-funded millionaire, or we keep up with his ad buys and come out of this stronger than ever before.
**So how do we keep up?** We raise up a grassroots army so freaking big that we can match him dollar-for-dollar, flip PA blue, and send a true Pennsylvania fighter for working people to the Senate.
**[What do you say, Derek? Can you donate $5 now to help us fight back against this multi-million dollar TV ad onslaught from Dr. Oz? Every bit helps.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40703?refcode=ema20220109-4140&t=1&akid=4140%2E434096%2ExmOFjw)**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40703?refcode=ema20220109-4140&t=2&akid=4140%2E434096%2ExmOFjw)
**[FIGHT BACK: DONATE $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40703?refcode=em20220109-4140&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4140%2E434096%2ExmOFjw)**
The biggest mistake we could make right now is underestimating Dr. Oz.
Yeah, he’s a celebrity doctor.
Yeah, he’s spent the last decade profiting off of *provably false* obscure medical theories and conspiracies.
Yeah, his home isn’t even in Pennsylvania ... it’s in New Jersey.
**But, you know what? We know another rich celebrity that the politicians and pundits underestimated.** His name is Donald Trump and he won Pennsylvania in 2016. 🙄
With enough money + fame to buy his way to the top, Dr. Oz is a serious threat to win not only the Republican nomination, but the whole damn thing.
**[That’s why we’re asking today: Can you make a $5 donation to help us fight Dr. Oz’s multi-million dollar TV ad onslaught?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40703?refcode=ema20220109-4140&t=4&akid=4140%2E434096%2ExmOFjw)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40703?refcode=em20220109-4140&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=4140%2E434096%2ExmOFjw)**
Let’s win this thing,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220109-4140-footer&t=24&refcode2=4140_434096_xmOFjw&akid=4140%2E434096%2ExmOFjw)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=4140%2E434096%2ExmOFjw)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=4140%2E434096%2ExmOFjw)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: BREAKING: A far-right Trump Republican just launched his campaign against me

Team – A far-right Republican just jumped into New Hampshire's Senate race to defeat me and flip the Senate red. In 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes, beating the incumbent Republican in one of the closest races in history. And now, polls are showing that this race could be even tighter. **With the Senate split 50-50, losing even one seat means losing our fragile Democratic majority.** I'm reaching out because I need your support now more than ever, friend. **[Can you rush $5 right now to help my team and me defend this seat and hold the Senate in 2022?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40518733/324740498/-1281091919?refcode=e20220109_mwh-opponent&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDcyMmMzMC1iMjcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qpmlSj3IYwLtlRHfI-kc390HSvk6NdXXocW3CXn5UMs=)** Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies have already spent over $7 million attacking me. And with another extreme Trump Republican now in the race, **_millions more in dark money_** will flood the Granite State. The stakes of this election are high, and this race will decide the fate of the Senate. That's why I'm reaching out to you today, team. If we're going to protect our Senate majority and stop Mitch McConnell from enacting his right-wing agenda, we're going to need as much grassroots support as we can get. **[Can I count on you to chip in to help defend this seat and keep our Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40518734/324740499/-1281091919?refcode=e20220109_mwh-opponent&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDcyMmMzMC1iMjcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qpmlSj3IYwLtlRHfI-kc390HSvk6NdXXocW3CXn5UMs=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Rush $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40518735/324740500/-1281091919?refcode=e20220109_mwh-opponent&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDcyMmMzMC1iMjcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qpmlSj3IYwLtlRHfI-kc390HSvk6NdXXocW3CXn5UMs=)

[Rush $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40518736/324740501/-1281091919?refcode=e20220109_mwh-opponent&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDcyMmMzMC1iMjcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qpmlSj3IYwLtlRHfI-kc390HSvk6NdXXocW3CXn5UMs=)

Winning in a swing state like New Hampshire isn’t easy, and it isn’t cheap. Far-right groups have spent more money attacking me than _any other Senate candidate in the country_ , and the entire GOP network of billionaire megadonors is lining up to try and defeat me.
**[So please, chip in $5 to help my team and me keep this seat and our Senate blue in 2022. What happens in New Hampshire could shape the course of our country for decades.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40518739/324740504/-1281091919?refcode=e20220109_mwh-opponent&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDcyMmMzMC1iMjcxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qpmlSj3IYwLtlRHfI-kc390HSvk6NdXXocW3CXn5UMs=)**

Maggie Hassan

I couldn’t be more grateful to have you with me. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:
It's been about 8 months since the FBI's dawn raid on my apartment.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59203249:6eycUoENN:m:1:3253819041:771FA88E4DCB14912E8E02E89D8F1455:r)
---
Peter,
---
After a year of being targeted by the FBI, it seems 2022 will be no different.
---
At the end of last year, President Trump's former Chief of Staff, Mark Meadows, was held in criminal contempt of Congress just weeks after the indictment of Steve Bannon.
---
__I then learned Adam Schiff wrote a libelous email about me, suggesting I 'll be his next target. He's always wanted to take down the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump.__
---
These corrupt government goons are trying to destroy me with a mountain of legal battles and fees, and I need your urgent help fighting back.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as the Deep State tries to destroy me with endless legal battles and fees.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59203249:6eycUoENN:m:1:3253819041:771FA88E4DCB14912E8E02E89D8F1455:r)

---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59203253:6eycUoENN:m:1:3253819041:771FA88E4DCB14912E8E02E89D8F1455:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59203254:6eycUoENN:m:1:3253819041:771FA88E4DCB14912E8E02E89D8F1455:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59203249:6eycUoENN:m:1:3253819041:771FA88E4DCB14912E8E02E89D8F1455:r)**
---
As I've told Tucker Carlson, I have nothing to hide.
---
_It 's been about eight months since the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment. _
---
_If they had dirt on me, you better believe it would 've been exposed by now. They even SURVEILLED my private communications with President Trump for crying out loud! _
---
That's what's so terrifying about what's taking place.
---
**Innocent citizens like me are being targeted, harassed, and indicted by the federal government despite having committed NO CRIMES.**
---
But in the eyes of the Deep State, we're guilty of a serious crime: loyalty to a political outsider -- President Trump -- and his mission to drain the swamp.
---
As Alan Dershowitz has said, we are witnessing tactics that you'd expect from a third-world dictatorship, not the United States of America.
---
Sadly, America's days as the freest nation in the world may be coming to an end.
---
That's why I refuse to surrender this battle. It's not just my freedom that I'm fighting for. Our country's system of justice rests on the chopping block.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as the Deep State tries to destroy me with endless legal battles and fees.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59203249:6eycUoENN:m:1:3253819041:771FA88E4DCB14912E8E02E89D8F1455:r)

Thank you,

clean_body: | | | | This first report is critical Dear Friend, We are just 3 days from our first finance report and I need your help! We are just months from the primary and this first report is going to say a lot about the strength of our campaign. I need to add another 100 grassroots contributors to my campaign in the next 3 days. That means three donors giving $250 or less. | | | | | | Thank you for your help in this final push! | CAMPAIGN UPDATE
---
JACK BALLARD – CANDIDATE FOR U.S. HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES
[](?refcode=iterable_3495523&refcode2=iterable_4768356&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=)
| | | GREAT FALLS, MT
---
CARPENTER’S UNION
Jack spoke by Zoom to the Great Falls chapter of the Pacific Northwest Council of the United Brotherhood of Carpenters. The conversation covered not only labor-related concerns but also public lands issues.
| | HELENA, MT
---
HELENA HUNTERS AND ANGLERS ASSOCIATION
Jack offered his ideas about public lands that are currently inaccessible to the public and issues over elk management in Montana.
Jack also spoke by Zoom to the Park County Democrats about spiraling housing costs, the need for live-able wages and ag challenges in MT.
| | RED LODGE, MT
---
CHRISTMAS STROLL
Jack and his wife, Lisa, got into the holiday spirit at this annual event on Broadway Ave. They visited retailers, sampled homemade treats, bought gifts and enjoyed a festive evening out.

Jack also attended the Carbon County Democrats holiday party.
| [](?refcode=iterable_3495523&refcode2=iterable_4768356&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=) | | | **JACK IN THE MEDIA** _(CLICK ON THE NAME TO WATCH OR READ):_
---
[Montana Free Press](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=b4cd22c23aa141ba8a0ac3c5ff4e858a&_e=BAooc6672Q6_N3_urvta8BfJpxtL94VbQYsjAasx-zBhirmVUqWwbTE5sqdzwrjdgkowdiPxO_pEsbzFMLPiqs8dEUawRzKb2TUpVBUam5rXEd5sOSOOqIXMbCMfS_HefnXwQK8OXp3cAKYRs1F8rdgTEgyPtW9eoTigKzrsxZ8AalnFz5t8NKUoiBhHGYAdIxCzSGpuF51iG-fZX4BA4shJ6IDgoZYWj8OecdeblQHG3PKVA96N9e6UfZZQOL929DjHLbbto47gYt-V-bAlHB5cKJvu7P_hOIA1Gp2wYAMVws_wYOX3QZQmacDpO9oh5K0Hbujf83Z_nmHlAJwv9gniD-wCBEHq5GsMhmve_maBJiZ5jsLFPAuwk6G2gE4mmgpDPV1AAf0lUwKOoK-VnTfWx-z5OTqc2AX0KD64NwI3cHzGNpLhuqcYOmrJ__0S) Jack’s testimony - to focus on harvesting cow elk and incentivize landowners to allow public hunting during the general season to reduce the overpopulation of elk in Montana – was included in news coverage of a statewide Montana Fish, Wildlife and Parks hearing on its controversial elk management strategy.
[Billings Gazette:](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=b4cd22c23aa141ba8a0ac3c5ff4e858a&_e=BAooc6672Q6_N3_urvta8PCSDstkgxAkAYCXlHCGntkZLFH02P8Bi_ig2C32POaYenpi9dGD6PYTEyc-ltHPenqrbLllPR6nWhwde-NSeGzHmIz1o1H6lnRGnCnofYGR1TjX7jk8E1foyZTgiXj_PscbpZOnJEStsk7cXtkyRjnILzzzr5zrE_gyww3ZcQj445v1-cI7LuAwRPl_D7eJsRQZbnixVbZOBsj_pIHDVmnFHSj_SEpUEvXJgC3oEhhTydeuf-mDOC6eVX-mm66rhfOR_AuBd2Wx-dadYdO-V0TbybzZz8peJ4-p5GMMRquOP34897xDKj4xsAozzmJK_OwFA8IDvHj6ZbP4iEsdnEiBZPV9PjnGOWXi7LPjdwC8iE5y_EvOUA1rMIPOAhMRE8enkT-d-VnqkXXygDNvqu34zWHz9NoLM5caXqghJgixVqRNnaMCuYinWY2whp0waeZ0QgysxXt8_Fs7kTB_9wMi7yyp7vMyPgnrz96umujQ) Jack’s op-ed criticized Montana Congressman Matt Rosendale for not showing up to vote for a bipartisan bill that will provide critical funding to help control Chronic Wasting Disease (CWD), when big game hunting is a foundational element of Montana’s economy and culture.
| | Jack Ballard for Montana – Newsletter #4 | | 1

| | | Cutting a Christmas Tree
---
Jack and Lisa take you into the woods to find a Christmas tree, a cherished holiday tradition in their family and among many Montana families. To watch, [click here](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=b4cd22c23aa141ba8a0ac3c5ff4e858a&_e=BAooc6672Q6_N3_urvta8Px2CNwzvjh6DkG-5bC89s2aeIhZrFaxKLrKHwT4jYoENMV5x4LtWMnBTtJQnY-1h-WUet8wRebfuKwQRklfr0iMhMkLqgySeXyuTTk89gLz4y_Xo0wombJnf-fjZzPmUkYOa4IUvMrtB59HXr9OqcYGj2M2vlgbr9T6kUqLZdQlNJ25aLOLo7XzE6KSdhNcFRXy9TpI1tCkH7ky-EbF5_QvoSZ6pZz9rWS-SONpSsJj2IVUOp2lerUiXpJmiJOje2c0NRjtGpcNx3qqzu1QH-I%3D).

| | **,** ******Democrats are trying to bring their abortion-on-demand agenda to New Jersey, and it’s up to pro-life conservatives like you and me to stop them.**
**That’s why tomorrow morning, I’m joining my together with many other pro-life warriors in Trenton to protest Democrats’ new “Reproductive Freedom Act” which would allow for more late-term abortions and lead to the murder of thousands of unborn children.** **I’m calling on YOU to join me there.** _**When: Monday, January 10th at 9:30 a.m.**_ _**Where: State House Annex, 145 W State Street Trenton, NJ**_
**, the stakes are simply too high for pro-life conservatives to sit this one out. That’s why I’m joining the fight and calling on you to stand with us as well. **
**Thank you,**
#### **Mike Blasi**
**[_P.S. If you can’t make it tomorrow but still want to support our pro-life campaign, you can contribute here. >>_](https://MikeBlasiForCongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed3ab556783898df4fb1eb6a1&id=082b231e6e&e=5c7b109522)**

| Consistent with federal law, House Majority PAC makes its federal contributions from one account (the “Contribution Account”) and engages in the rest of its political activity from the other account (the “Non-Contribution Account”). You may contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year to House Majority PAC's Contribution Account. You may contribute an unlimited amount to House Majority PAC's Non-Contribution Account. This campaign is not supported by a bunch of big corporate PACs, corporations, and wealthy donors waiting in the wings.
It’s all powered by folks like you. Together, we’re building a movement to defeat Kevin McCarthy and bring real leadership that fights for working people back to California’s 23rd District.
[**That’s why I’m asking if you'll add your endorsement — and send a message to Kevin McCarthy that he and his corporate backers are no match for thousands of people standing up and demanding better. _*YOU ARE ONE OF 1,500 HAND-PICKED DEMOCRATS SELECTED BECAUSE OF YOUR COMMITMENT TO THE DEMOCRATIC PARTY. PLEASE, ANSWER HONESTLY BEFORE MIDNIGHT!*_
Team, as the first woman Vice President, Kamala Harris has broken one of the highest glass ceilings in our country.
We think Harris will go down in history as one of the most important figures in American history.
_But Republicans are smearing her DAILY in hopes of ruining her legacy!_
So now, we’re reaching out to our BEST Democratic supporters — _including YOU!_ — to help us solidify Kamala Harris’ AMAZING legacy as Vice President.
**[COMPLETE YOUR SURVEY ON VICE PRESIDENT HARRIS NOW→](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Harris_Legacy_Survey/?source=VPP_20220109_EMSURV_E2_T0_AC&t=9&akid=1099%2E878179%2Ecz4LoK)**

_They’re spreading disgusting lies to turn Americans AGAINST her. DISGUSTING!_
If we don’t fight back, Americans everywhere will BELIEVE the GOP’s lies – so we urgently need your input to show strong public support for Kamala Harris.
**We only selected 1,500 Democrats, and you were one of them -- because YOUR input is so valuable!**
**[PLEASE, before midnight: Take 90 seconds to complete our Kamala Harris Legacy Survey →](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Harris_Legacy_Survey/?source=VPP_20220109_EMSURV_E2_T0_AC&t=11&akid=1099%2E878179%2Ecz4LoK)**

subject: Filibuster in serious danger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| Fellow patriot,

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=39113bb334ab4fe0abf621b5b3a5cb99&_e=qDHjnY5785G7kVIjYf5ZAg0JGhrUYd6m54mRxo5Blz9ziawkNXwv64VaTJGyXjNRmd0X-_t-wVJqjJJ4ttdW7o-R30XUdFXyw1ij8mc-1_gL-abuXnHc3TA63vSob2cRKIvCqQ3ersL7rUpG5FZCQlHRM2nMDfNQQnHrhU2YesgYY-QvjWl1lPM2hZ7upiUPKLi96U7MPZjO9lyo3lhujTB-4plXGVVk4fn7huIEaRN4dh-n6DY242ECaeGUGo_Z_GWhTvk-V4MRiL_ejrXyKtLevUvgN_hkxee--fyi6hqZoZcRabgAgS6Uf3pTlZbIAxezR5sL9hbl-VCoE6Q5R2hewKPUJ7G5UlGhVtp8quxtxEplDHFj4Y4w1C77ZRBSdeadbiCN2Fsyfe93BNzXh21HHSCinpivbJPJmXIyDkvd9T6atz3q5mF4-3MtPFw6x1-C4xbDnbGhvaFvxj0Nkw%3D%3D)
We’ve known for a while that Senate Democrat Leader Chuck Schumer wanted to gut the filibuster in order to jam divisive, partisan legislation through the Senate.

Instead of leaving elections and voting laws to the states where it belongs, Chuck Schumer wants to usurp the power of state legislators and radically transform our society by making it **easier to commit voter fraud**.

He wants to TRASH of one of the instruments the Senate has used since 1806 to make sure that the voice of the minority party matters.

**Democrats are so afraid of losing their majority in this November’s election that they’re resorting to dangerous tactics in an all-out effort to keep control of the Senate.**

We need your help to make sure Senator Schumer fails in his efforts to gut the filibuster.

If you believe “nuking” the filibuster is a terrible idea, then we need your immediate help. There are a handful of Democrat senators up for reelection this year that think they can stay under the radar by not taking a public position on the matter.

**[Will you chip in $1 or more today to help us wage a maximum pressure campaign encouraging them to declare if they stand with Senator Schumer or not?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=39113bb334ab4fe0abf621b5b3a5cb99&_e=qDHjnY5785G7kVIjYf5ZAg0JGhrUYd6m54mRxo5Blz9ziawkNXwv64VaTJGyXjNRmd0X-_t-wVJqjJJ4ttdW7o-R30XUdFXyw1ij8mc-1_gL-abuXnHc3TA63vSob2cRKIvCqQ3ersL7rUpG5FZCQlHRM2nMDfNQQnHrhU2YesgYY-QvjWl1lPM2hZ7upiUPKLi96U7MPZjO9lyo3lhujTB-4plXGVVk4fn7huIEaRN4dh-n6DY242ECaeGUGo_Z8j4zgmyl3QqIbLnYmdhyPBVrITgvbFACQMdbTvoqQZCWeBlfYB4Zm4kGWpcREhoPG0FbumzimgxiItRYWRVbBW2_991Ay59FcxRJrpxbi6_SRpHWZmGh8HM8ftyO_bh6L7luKa1pPKa5I-2VjMYotzM9TrmN9IYT1lTt6YgAj4arqWOLPUOGzH9XGaL9bQJLr2OWLfM5pWL6vZo60kisnQ%3D%3D)**

[** SAVE THE FILIBUSTER
CHIP IN $1 ORE MORE TODAY->**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=39113bb334ab4fe0abf621b5b3a5cb99&_e=qDHjnY5785G7kVIjYf5ZAg0JGhrUYd6m54mRxo5Blz9ziawkNXwv64VaTJGyXjNRmd0X-_t-wVJqjJJ4ttdW7o-R30XUdFXyw1ij8mc-1_gL-abuXnHc3TA63vSob2cRKIvCqQ3ersL7rUpG5FZCQlHRM2nMDfNQQnHrhU2YesgYY-QvjWl1lPM2hZ7upiUPKLi96U7MPZjO9lyo3lhujTB-4plXGVVk4fn7huIEaRN4dh-n6DY242ECaeGUGo_ZI5uO_neZVAU0Pj-M1WVuQF9otrxEJuPLb49rvy7WcO2ctVPinteoGwJeziOtthmGiYSB3RI_5ntaO06uUomb1Shodsciq7CWX9P4kgS4UDKqhSgLdRiQ8-ASeF8SfVbpT4ZuSotBxZ_6Hhk-ScUo_cv6A9TITyG5k1T76hPg3Lv0xzn7zX5ZYSSS9xqanjFjkmRx7dFbrjf_vJn79UdkUg%3D%3D)

Democrats want to act now because they know that if they’re able to make their mark on how states conduct elections, it will be difficult – if not outright impossible - for Republicans to reverse Democrat power grabs down the road.

**BUT THERE’S MORE:** Democrats are so determined to change the rules of the Senate before the fall election arrives that they’re even resorting to publicly shaming members of their own party who don’t support their move to get rid of the filibuster.

We desperately need your help to make sure that voters around the country, and especially in states with Senate elections this year, know that Democrats will stop at NOTHING to undermine the rules of the Senate in order to give them a leg up come November.

**[Will you chip in $1 or more today to help us here at the NRSC make sure voters know Democrats don’t want to play by the rules?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=39113bb334ab4fe0abf621b5b3a5cb99&_e=qDHjnY5785G7kVIjYf5ZAg0JGhrUYd6m54mRxo5Blz9ziawkNXwv64VaTJGyXjNRmd0X-_t-wVJqjJJ4ttdW7o-R30XUdFXyw1ij8mc-1_gL-abuXnHc3TA63vSob2cRKIvCqQ3ersL7rUpG5FZCQlHRM2nMDfNQQnHrhU2YesgYY-QvjWl1lPM2hZ7upiUPKLi96U7MPZjO9lyo3lhujTB-4plXGVVk4fn7huIEaRN4dh-n6DY242ECaeGUGo_ZgL5dzzv6VzKPhV5CKVyOsVZiNuYgy-_NGspqcqHOdhfxYQt_2rTu-hh_aBtRaVafVMYojHiKKbcGkDrWkEyHfGJiVe0Ms4JEPe601a7SyfRso2E2HHdfubrEWBeeYNLfOepoBbAnWb0WdQyCEn8j1CvZd2-e5NvQ_ad_gWBRQNWUO45GnArUCnI-W2Nl5PzTBHnMN0QtByl69B4Co3Ek_Q%3D%3D)**

Thank you,
TEAM NRSC

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brice=20Wiggins?=
subject: Brice Wiggins Weekly Legislative & Campaign Trail Update Jan. 9, 2022
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/9ad3c914694b/brice-wiggins-for-congress-highlights-from-the-campaign-trail-8788593?e=698f056321)
Logo

Welcome to this year’s edition of our weekly update! Here we will recap a few highlights of the week in my role as State Senator from District 52 and provide updates from the Congressional Campaign as well. Fulfilling my duties as State Senator will be a top priority for me during this campaign. After all, I took an oath to honorably serve my constituents and the Constitution.

"America is never wholly herself unless she is engaged in high moral principle. We as people have such a purpose today. It is to make kinder the face of the Nation and gentler the face of the world. My friends, we have work to do."

- President George H.W. Bush

** Another Great Legislative Session Begins
------------------------------------------------------------

We gaveled into this year’s Mississippi Legislative session at 12:00 on Tuesday at the Capitol in Jackson. Just like that we are back in a new legislative session. It got paused briefly due to Lt. Governor Hosemann testing positive for COVID-19, but your Mississippi legislative process will be running on all cylinders this upcoming week. I'm proud and excited to be here doing the job that you have elected me to do!

** Welcome Aboard Sam Carter to the Brice Wiggins for Congress Team
------------------------------------------------------------

We welcomed a new member to our team! Meet Sam Carter of Pearl River County. He is a first-year law student at Mississippi College School of Law and has recently signed on to help with our campaign. We are so happy to have you Sam. I aspire to always be a role model for young people in Mississippi. Investing time into our youth today will help shape our leaders for tomorrow.

** Meet Some of Our College-Level State Senate Pages
------------------------------------------------------------

I also had the opportunity this week to meet some of our Mississippi Senate Senior pages. Senate pages and internships are great ways for students to learn more about the legislative process and serve the people of Mississippi. These are current students at Southern Miss and Mississippi State; from left to right we have John Walters, Sadie Roush, Thomas Pepper, and Kelsi Ford. These young adults are experiencing the legislative session first-hand and loving every bit of it!

As I have said before, it is our job as leaders to inspire the next generation. Those of us currently serving must be role models for our youth. After all, they're watching and learning NOW and could be our elected officials someday.

** New Sergeant-at-Arms Sworn In
------------------------------------------------------------

It was great getting to meet newly sworn-in Sergeant-At-Arms, Col. Larry Wagner. He is retired from the Mississippi Highway Patrol with a distinguished career and is responsible for order and protection in the Senate. Join me in welcoming him!

** The Republican Party is Alive and Strong in Greene County!
------------------------------------------------------------

It was great to meet everyone at the Greene County Republican Club on Thursday night. I appreciated the opportunity. One of my first cases as an Asst. D.A happened in this courtroom. It was great to be back!

** Received an ‘A’ Rating from the Mississippi Association of Chiefs of Police
------------------------------------------------------------

I’m proud to have received an ‘A’ rating this week from the Mississippi Association of Chiefs of Police. As your Congressman, you can count on me to continue an “A” rating in supporting our law enforcement and first responders.

** The Week Ahead
------------------------------------------------------------

** State Senate to Vote on Redistricting
------------------------------------------------------------

Every 10 years after completion of the Census, every state in the nation re-draws its voting districts based on shifts in the population. As a member of the Senate Redistricting committee, we have been working hard for months to develop the new maps. We traveled the state in the late summer and fall, holding hearings to get the public’s input. This week the new plan passed the House and will come to the Senate for consideration.

** Teacher Pay Raise
------------------------------------------------------------

The Senate will likely take up a teacher pay raise bill. Senate Education Chairman Dennis Debar from George County traveled to the state meeting with teachers. The Senate Education Committee, on which I serve, also held hearings on the issue. As the author of Mississippi’s nationally ranked early education program, supporting our teachers is a priority.

** Medical Marijuana
------------------------------------------------------------

The Senate will likely take up the medical marijuana bill that we have been working on since the end of last year’s legislative session. With no less than three committee hearings of the Senate Public Health and Welfare Committee, which I sit on, the issue has been well discussed. As I have discussed, debated and researched the issue for the last year, I have publicly stated I will vote for the bill, even with Governor Reeves’ recent comments. Click HERE (https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=833801668d&e=698f056321) to see my interview with Y’all Politics to learn more. Should an amendment come forward to address Governor Reeves’ genuine concern, as I hope there will be, I will vote for that, too. The process has, and is working, to get us a bill that over 70% of the people asked for.

Please stay tuned for future emails with updates from the legislative session, District 52, community events, and our Congressional campaign. Our campaign is in full swing and as you know, getting our message out takes funding. If you would like to provide financial support, please click the button below.

Sincerely,

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: asking for input, not money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Please, will you spare just 30 seconds of your Sunday and tell me what's on your mind? Don't delay | |
__
**50,000 grassroots Democrats have completed my critical January Priorities Survey --_but you 're not one of them._

This is my most important survey yet -- and your input is key to protecting our Democratic House Majority.

That's why I had to reach out one last time to ask you for your feedback.

This is your final chance! Will you complete my survey before midnight?**

[****](https://links.e.dccc.)**[https://action.dccc.org/january-2022-priority-survey](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_)**

| **10 URGENT RESPONSES FROM YOUR AREA REQUESTED:**

**My first and most important survey of 2022 is officially underway.

And there are just seven hours left before my midnight deadline.

So please: Do you have 30 seconds to take my January Priorities Survey straight away?**

**Before midnight: Will you take my December Priorities Survey and let me know how you 're feeling?**
---
[YES! >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_) | | [NO >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

The past year has shown just how critical our Democratic House Majority is.

From passing the American Rescue Plan, to securing a historic investment in infrastructure, to defending voting and reproductive rights, Democrats are hard at work fighting for the American people.

**But I need you to understand: The only reason our Majority has been able to accomplish so much is because of grassroots Democrats like you got us there in the first place.**

That's why my team and I value your input more than you could ever know.

And that's why I'm reaching out one last time and asking you to take my January Priorities Survey before midnight.

[**Please, will you spare just 30 seconds of your Sunday and tell me what 's on your mind? Don't delay!**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-aRwEt_)
---

Thank you,

Nancy
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46221283&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2MDk1ODMwNgS2&l=14321626&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46221283&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2MDk1ODMwNgS2&l=14321626&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25&recurring=true). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
subject: How we won
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

After we won our first race in 2018, we dove right back in.

We celebrated Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez’s upset victory against a powerful
corporate Democrat, then we got back to work. We took that momentum and
helped elect Jamaal Bowman in 2020, in a district very close to AOC's.

In early 2019, AOC introduced the Green New Deal resolution into Congress
and we hustled to find a progressive to challenge incumbent Eliot Engel in
NY-16.

Through our candidate nominating process, Jamaal Bowman’s name came in to
JD. At the time, Jamaal was an award-winning middle school principal in
the Bronx. After interviews, meetings, and a ton of campaign preparation,
we helped Jamaal launch his run for Congress in New York’s 16th
Congressional District.

We took what we learned from AOC’s race, and the volunteer base who
knocked doors and made phone calls for her upset victory, and hit the
ground running with Jamaal. We helped build a digital presence for the
campaign, spent weeks working alongside local community members and
organizers to build a coalition on the ground, and helped find staff and
volunteers for the campaign.

We helped Jamaal and his team build a grassroots campaign rooted in
communities the incumbent neglected for decades and raised over $2.1
million dollars with an average contribution of $30. JD staff and
volunteers helped lead important parts of Jamaal’s field program — from
the creation of the field organizing plan to managing the campaign’s GOTV
distributed organizing program to helping run massive phone banking and
post-card writing campaigns.

Jamaal took down another powerful corporate incumbent, all because of the
work we did together. The incumbent had big money behind him, and a ton of
last minute smear campaigns against Jamaal, but our grassroots fundraising
and organizing prevailed.

We have the chance now to elect 6 more Justice Democrats this year in open
seats and against corporate-backed incumbents. We can win with less money
but it still takes a wave of grassroots support — folks chipping in $5,
$27, or whatever they can afford — to run winning campaigns against the
political establishment. And in-person early voting in our first primaries
(in Texas) starts in just 36 days.

Peter, we really
need you to chip in today so we can build 2022 campaigns that can defeat
corporate incumbents. It’s us vs. Wall Street, fossil fuel executives, and
health insurance companies. Can you chip in $2.70, $27, or anything at all
today to help us elect 6 working class progressives in 2022?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88731?refcode=em20220109-21405&t=1002&akid=21405%2E1203867%2Ea1Sl0P ]→ Yes, I can donate to help Justice Democrats upend the political
establishment and elect a new class of progressive fighters to Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88731?refcode=em20220109-21405&t=1003&akid=21405%2E1203867%2Ea1Sl0P ]Contribute

Thank you so much for your support. I know we can do big things together
this year.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas, Executive Director
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1004&akid=21405%2E1203867%2Ea1Sl0P ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1005&akid=21405%2E1203867%2Ea1Sl0P ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220109-21405-footer&t=1006&refcode2=21405_1203867_a1Sl0P&akid=21405%2E1203867%2Ea1Sl0P

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=21405%2E1203867%2Ea1Sl0P

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
| Fellow patriot,

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ff0a793853a44aa49e8a3abf74e5308d&_e=BmiR-CSaFAKPjwA0efRhxLaPi_qJJZI7ei6BxbMhcyKUbZ4o-qaUJwNJuArnoPHc0C80kVEaQop4rLH5bYxdKZKVAqxnRRIb2kWRbcs2BCAqLeHEa6PcmennyZXC_jQMO5pG9Iiq2DCv_6wpxX-vVeg_RbjvAdPKhccdUp-v6sOxjRHfdEa3vJfmg2whT5NR2yo4W2FEE3hyT3XxXabjP3j7-s4jtXqzugUzgnbukq7Nv3ptrqvx3UtsPCuM02R_l2cgysnqbKAlQf5swuVExA9nStrCzN83p-yBvkt3N6ke9qXTxxLHZ3M8ZNbM7KZz8bAuR8fYTelUuOK2hvRrM_x2m3d0G80AL_bHe1cdSr6Gm4STECEw5g6iwUKRNHphZyQ53rie8gOwczUeSI8Jg9mgO2VdgTTaPJQLYSyoL_327tr6ZPO6oIaXCSmILWdsgJ6EXidACCWQyN4JEVOW6sXNkFwsea-7atWKpVSbGUQ%3D)
We’ve known for a while that Senate Democrat Leader Chuck Schumer wanted to gut the filibuster in order to jam divisive, partisan legislation through the Senate.

Instead of leaving elections and voting laws to the states where it belongs, Chuck Schumer wants to usurp the power of state legislators and radically transform our society by making it **easier to commit voter fraud**.

He wants to TRASH of one of the instruments the Senate has used since 1806 to make sure that the voice of the minority party matters.

**Democrats are so afraid of losing their majority in this November’s election that they’re resorting to dangerous tactics in an all-out effort to keep control of the Senate.**

We need your help to make sure Senator Schumer fails in his efforts to gut the filibuster.

If you believe “nuking” the filibuster is a terrible idea, then we need your immediate help. There are a handful of Democrat senators up for reelection this year that think they can stay under the radar by not taking a public position on the matter.

**[Will you chip in $1 or more today to help us wage a maximum pressure campaign encouraging them to declare if they stand with Senator Schumer or not?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ff0a793853a44aa49e8a3abf74e5308d&_e=BmiR-CSaFAKPjwA0efRhxLaPi_qJJZI7ei6BxbMhcyKUbZ4o-qaUJwNJuArnoPHc0C80kVEaQop4rLH5bYxdKZKVAqxnRRIb2kWRbcs2BCAqLeHEa6PcmennyZXC_jQMO5pG9Iiq2DCv_6wpxX-vVeg_RbjvAdPKhccdUp-v6sOxjRHfdEa3vJfmg2whT5NR2yo4W2FEE3hyT3XxXabjP3j7-s4jtXqzugUzgnbukq7Nv3ptrqvx3UtsPCuM02R_1NRL4gii9ADxLjgmro17uj8kBhzZLwi_s1bH1AtYmiAV2r3WVSdvR6mGROAbugef9mEDNopxcFslrHYy5g_vKJKfAp2Lhw_lNiY6NArOWWjUa3uJ31mOch796MCiAZjhqPsyD5grTXng_7CX872Jqka9NL9svG8zUjSeEpVDcp5EzQfFD0i7HBC_f02RWjsVF1K0c5dfH2H6xMF9OQOPUqZVK5ZoX7K6iyQmquzowqM%3D)**

[** SAVE THE FILIBUSTER
CHIP IN $1 ORE MORE TODAY->**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ff0a793853a44aa49e8a3abf74e5308d&_e=BmiR-CSaFAKPjwA0efRhxLaPi_qJJZI7ei6BxbMhcyKUbZ4o-qaUJwNJuArnoPHc0C80kVEaQop4rLH5bYxdKZKVAqxnRRIb2kWRbcs2BCAqLeHEa6PcmennyZXC_jQMO5pG9Iiq2DCv_6wpxX-vVeg_RbjvAdPKhccdUp-v6sOxjRHfdEa3vJfmg2whT5NR2yo4W2FEE3hyT3XxXabjP3j7-s4jtXqzugUzgnbukq7Nv3ptrqvx3UtsPCuM02R_8facKKtprKSW3x1EsGMy3fCV0bqwCKtIVxsgLA2bDLgEYP7Z8426vYZkALMNxSHDVOEJE6lsP-Mkv76ThPGrkp9ITlaYuWNokoXQyGONGNwU3SZweF9sjB8c0rTwlYvt3wBVAWrWGSFBPuMU7HgG5h8KQ-yrBRsG1XRm1tXTdvZrrdQH4AFjgNt-9EctdWfeZAk0GZT58uvU8blvuaG4fPKaiOunBh5lh2pP60UPtF8%3D)

Democrats want to act now because they know that if they’re able to make their mark on how states conduct elections, it will be difficult – if not outright impossible - for Republicans to reverse Democrat power grabs down the road.

**BUT THERE’S MORE:** Democrats are so determined to change the rules of the Senate before the fall election arrives that they’re even resorting to publicly shaming members of their own party who don’t support their move to get rid of the filibuster.

We desperately need your help to make sure that voters around the country, and especially in states with Senate elections this year, know that Democrats will stop at NOTHING to undermine the rules of the Senate in order to give them a leg up come November.

**[Will you chip in $1 or more today to help us here at the NRSC make sure voters know Democrats don’t want to play by the rules?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ff0a793853a44aa49e8a3abf74e5308d&_e=BmiR-CSaFAKPjwA0efRhxLaPi_qJJZI7ei6BxbMhcyKUbZ4o-qaUJwNJuArnoPHc0C80kVEaQop4rLH5bYxdKZKVAqxnRRIb2kWRbcs2BCAqLeHEa6PcmennyZXC_jQMO5pG9Iiq2DCv_6wpxX-vVeg_RbjvAdPKhccdUp-v6sOxjRHfdEa3vJfmg2whT5NR2yo4W2FEE3hyT3XxXabjP3j7-s4jtXqzugUzgnbukq7Nv3ptrqvx3UtsPCuM02R_8JONzn2DDzZQlM9TiNKmGp-BbR4oTJfzYTOHv4VoJS3Et14AIjQlSmdGpYUetUIHHVSTaAJ9M2Pdvd598mO_uiQEE1IYCPAeharKJT5-5LseLGWR5pS9AmXpqScmB7Zb4OIHnE3NqAqq4_e2rdQo93rKLlLUzSFK8obGgJ9PXAQYXDBySwlWeCKziFgYxRq5KdpYoZiicQqWLsSygi3gmoIyO-LpUMTSCEiPt1tRBFA%3D)**

Thank you,
TEAM NRSC

Peter - on Monday night, the University of Georgia Bulldogs will take on the Alabama Crimson Tide for the College Football National Championship.

To celebrate our Bulldogs playing again in the title game, Team Herschel is doing something very special...

**... we're giving away a UGA #34 jersey signed by Heisman Trophy winner Herschel Walker and personalized for the winner!**

**[Will you enter to win before kickoff on Monday night?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8cabbf91032740e7868ffc908645a004&_e=sFl5MXUlQqU0BX_dNf4cubNgPS04zNlWnczROwdhzPYJCbMOE-o9HXmKI22STnv-Av6j4JL5S6G-G1948aiFP72B1qWRmGtA27YFgApP_8VdparcCTg6_Ha3o8owpa_TbsJVoPia2a8nHmyl7Yj488mvixV0O0ZVTfNdG6G_UgrRaO3b62NL5vO5cryfyD4Yr_JW-RWOrA14_S_e3CHP-k4685iO5n7d7OFgoD9pMDD3mP83xNoz98r8kISfGq-a2jL5uCpg3finVy6sxIFRkvdcnUZsmKxwTLjZK-4jYiA8H_PsTxfJ75dvY39MUUGG1xV4lCYcCOEXHJqXaPo1_9Edg5U5g78KV1MKAlUkVFdCrYvgAJUmp7LrlHrIrJhl8g7wbrH3Qo0nBCaYeiRRo6bAKvxTa4V6aNoEaZ0YSJ_IBdor44BW7_nXzQHZGG_ZHeo5qcg3twJNYS-C9JVs0Aaig1JLB2yPC7PTqSMG7QE%3D)**

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8cabbf91032740e7868ffc908645a004&_e=sFl5MXUlQqU0BX_dNf4cubNgPS04zNlWnczROwdhzPYJCbMOE-o9HXmKI22STnv-Av6j4JL5S6G-G1948aiFP72B1qWRmGtA27YFgApP_8VdparcCTg6_Ha3o8owpa_TbsJVoPia2a8nHmyl7Yj488mvixV0O0ZVTfNdG6G_UgrRaO3b62NL5vO5cryfyD4Yr_JW-RWOrA14_S_e3CHP-k4685iO5n7d7OFgoD9pMDD3mP83xNoz98r8kISfGq-a2jL5uCpg3finVy6sxIFRkoXeOVTt3WJ4TI-U7jDHKAgbj3Nv6JaMZKAyS6vA6A6mobMif9TTZAd5C82exdNaBLvDuvNjOlJFCUBYlYAZ9aWWwlz6N3-ck2QhkXD0tHUjybS0xScd-i1117JfdZTSh0bIyJl4ddneg69cNvAqV071t-sDuLC8EauH-wKfkkVJItqcVMXzjd_9xWbHvazm1xUxfyLcoIfFZ_rwM4Tq8OM%3D)
